HOW CLOSELY DO SIDF'S 294 CUSTOM OBJECTS ALIGN WITH S/4HANA STANDARD?
FIT
Fit Level  ·  Score  ·  Share  ·  Sub-Score Breakdown
What It Means
Obj
count
Action
HIGH
FIT
HIGH FIT  ·  4 – 5  ·  31%
Score 5 → 62 obj  ·  Score 4 → 28 obj  |  Business function fully or largely served by S/4HANA standard. Minimal or zero custom extension required.
90
obj
RETIRE / REPLACE
  ↳ 5
    ↳ Score 5  ·  21%
    Fully served by standard Fiori app or scope item  |  Custom object is almost entirely redundant. Deploy standard S/4HANA on Day 1.
62
obj
RETIRE
  ↳ 4
    ↳ Score 4  ·  10%
    Largely served; small residual gap  |  A lightweight BTP extension fills the remaining gap. Business logic largely preserved by standard.
28
obj
REPLACE / EXTEND
MED
FIT
MEDIUM FIT  ·  3  ·  47%
All 139 objects scored exactly 3  |  Standard S/4HANA covers roughly half the requirement. A targeted BTP side-by-side or on-stack extension complements the standard process.
139
obj
TARGETED EXTENSION
LOW
FIT
LOW FIT  ·  0 – 2  ·  22%
Score 2 → 32 obj  ·  Score 1 → 31 obj  ·  Score 0 → 2 obj  |  S/4HANA standard provides no meaningful equivalent. Full rebuild on SAP BTP as side-by-side extensions required.
65
obj
BTP REBUILD
  ↳ 2
    ↳ Score 2  ·  11%
    Standard covers very little; significant functional gap  |  Full BTP side-by-side extension required. Standard handles adjacent processes only.
32
obj
BTP REBUILD
  ↳ 1
    ↳ Score 1  ·  11%
    Almost no standard coverage  |  Object logic has virtually no S/4HANA equivalent. Full custom build on BTP.
31
obj
BTP REBUILD
  ↳ 0
    ↳ Score 0  ·  1%
    Zero alignment with any S/4HANA scope item  |  Zero alignment with any standard S/4HANA scope item or Fiori app.
2
obj
BTP REBUILD
TOTAL
All 294 objects assessed across ZFI (91) · ZMM (42) · ZPP (2) · HR (159)
0 = no fit  ·  5 = full fit  ·  Source: SIDF Custom Objects Clean Core Registry  ·  Scores assigned per object from SIDF FI project PDF assessments
294
obj
100%
💡
STRATEGIC INSIGHT: S/4HANA Public Cloud covers all 5 SIDF lines of business with 44 standard scope items and 384 transaction codes. The 294 custom objects are fully assessed — 90 align closely with standard (High Fit), 139 require targeted BTP extensions (Medium Fit), 65 require full BTP rebuilds. Migration is executable today. No object is unaccounted for. Migration is executable today.

SAP Module Current SIDF Used Service (Standard & Custom) SAP SaaS Service (Public Cloud) Availability Note / Recommendations in case not available
Finance KP06, KSBL, KSBP, KSU1–KSU7KP06 – Cost Center Planning: Primary Costs KSBL – Cost Centers: Actual Line Items (comparison) KSBP – Cost Centers: Plan Line Items KSU1 – Create assessment cycle KSU2 – Change assessment cycle KSU3 – Display assessment cycle KSU5 – Execute assessment (Actual) KSU7 – Execute assessment (Plan) Universal Allocation — Cost Center Planning & Assessment CyclesImport financial plan data Upload statistical key figure plan data Execute cost center actual and plan assessment cycles Execute plan and actual profit center distributions Run plan data reports for cost centers View plan and actual profit center distributionsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance F.01, FAGLB03, FAGLL03, FS00, FSE2/3, KE5Z, KP06, OB13, S_ALR_*F.01 – Financial Statements (P&L & Balance Sheet) FAGLB03 – G/L Account Balances (ledger‑specific) FAGLL03 – G/L Line Item Display FS00 – Create / Change / Display G/L Account (central transaction) FSE2 – Change Financial Statement Version FSE3 – Display Financial Statement Version KE5Z – Profit Center Plan/Actual Line Items KP06 – Cost Center Plan (P&L planning) KSBP – Cost Center Plan / Actual line items OB13 – Create / Change / Display Chart of Accounts OBD4 – Define G/L account groups S_ALR_87012284 – Trial Balance S_ALR_87012287 – Balance Sheet / P&L Financial Planning and Analysis — G/L & Profit Center ReportingStructure G/L Account hierarchy for financial planning and analysis for both Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet statementsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FBL1N, FBL3N, FBL5N, FEBAN, FF_5FBL1N – Vendor open items (outgoing cash) FBL3N – G/L line items (bank, cash, clearing accounts) FBL5N – Customer open items (incoming cash) FEBAN – Bank statement post‑processing FF_5 – Electronic bank statement posting Liquidity Planning — Cash Flow ForecastingSupply the planning tool with historical/actual and short-term/mid-term forecast cash flow dataFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance KB21N, KSB1, KSU5, KSV5, S_ALR_87013611KB21N - Activity allocations KSB1 - Review postings KSU5 - Run assessments KSV5 - Run distributions S_ALR_87013611 - Variance analysis Overhead Cost Accounting — Cost Center ManagementRecord primary costs to cost centers by posting journal entries with reference to a cost center Update cost center with the correct values Post statistical key figures (for use in reporting or as tracing factors for period-based allocations) Distribute primary and secondary costs using an assessment cost element Run the cost centers actual data reporting Reassign costs and revenues Analyze allocation flow Maintain and monitor your cost center budget (optional) Transfer cost center budgetFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FAGLGVTR, FB01, FB03, FB50, FBD1/2, FBL3N, S_ALR_*FAGLGVTR – Balance carryforward FB01 / F‑02 – Post document (classic) FB03 – Display accounting document FB50 – G/L posting (single document entry) FBD1 – Create recurring entry document FBD2 – Change recurring entry FBL3N – G/L account line item display (commonly used as document journal) FBL3N – G/L line items with balances FBL3N – Review daily postings S_ALR_87012277 – G/L Account Balances report S_ALR_87012284 – Final Trial Balance S_ALR_87012284 – Trial balance SM35 – Batch input session monitoring (if interfaces ran) Accounting and Financial Close — G/L Journals & Period ClosePost general ledger account documents Display the document journal Display G/L balances (list) Perform recurring entries Maintain accounts with automatic and manual clearing Perform day-end closing Perform month-end closing Perform year-end closingFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance BP, FBL5N, FD01/02/03BP - Maintain business partners FBL5N - Display Customer Line Items FD01 - Create Customer FD02 - Change Customer FD03 - Display Customer Accounts Receivable — Customer Open Items & CollectionsManage and complete customer master data Analyze open items Reconcile open invoices with incoming payments automatically Process unassigned incoming payments to open invoices easily and efficiently Analyze efficiency of payment collection processing Process customer correspondence Process overdue item interest calculationFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance BP, FBL1N, FK01/02/03, FK08, MK03, XK01/02/03BP - Maintain business partners FBL1N - Display vendor line items FK01 - Create Vendor FK02 - Change Vendor FK03 - Display Vendor FK08 - Block Vendor MK03 - Display Vendor XK01 - Create Vendor (Central) XK02 - Change Vendor (Central) XK03 - Display Vendor (Central) Accounts Payable — Supplier Master & Invoice PaymentManage and complete supplier master data Create invoice from logistics Analyze outstanding payables Pay invoices Approve payments (optional) Forward payments to banks via SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (MBC) or download payment file Analyze efficiency of payment processingFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance ABAON, ABAVN, ABST2, AFAB, AR01, AS01/02/03, AW01N, F-90, ME21N, MIGO, MIROABAON – Retirement without revenue (scrap) ABAVN – Retirement with revenue (sale) ABST2 – Reconciliation with G/L ABZON – Acquisition without vendor ABZP – Down payment for asset AFAB – Execute depreciation run AFAB – Post depreciation AJRW – Recalculate depreciation ANLC / ANLB – Asset values tables (reporting) AR01 – Asset history sheet AS01 – Asset master (before or during PO creation) AS01 – Create Asset Master AS02 – Change Asset Master AS03 – Display Asset Master AS91 – Create legacy asset AS92 – Change legacy asset AS93 – Display legacy asset ASKB – Asset balances AW01N – Asset Explorer (values, depreciation, book value) F‑90 – Asset acquisition with vendor ME21N – Create purchase order (asset as account assignment) MIGO – Goods receipt (if applicable) MIRO – Invoice receipt Asset Accounting — Acquisition, Depreciation & RetirementCreate asset master Acquire, valuate, or retire assets Perform month-end closing and year-end closing Purchase asset from purchase order Create legacy assetsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance BP, FCLM_BAM, FI01/02/03, S_ALR_87007326/28BP – Business Partner (if signatories stored as BPs) FCLM_BAM – Bank Account Management (central cockpit) Create, change, close bank accounts Activate dual control / workflow approval FI01 – Create Bank Master FI02 – Change Bank Master FI03 – Display Bank Master NWBC – SAP NetWeaver Business Client (used for dual control workflows) S_ALR_87007326 – Bank account list S_ALR_87007328 – Bank account balances Advanced Bank Account Management — Dual Control & SignatoriesManage banks and bank accounts (in Direct Revision Activate; Dual Control Revision Activate; Workflow Revision Activate mode; Two-Person mode) Maintain signatory in multiple bank accounts (in Direct Revision Activate; Dual Control Revision Activate; Workflow Revision Activate mode) Review bank account yearly View bank account reports and fact sheetsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance BNK_APP, BNK_MONI, F110, F-53, FB03, FBL1N, FEBA, FEBAN, FF_5, FF7A/B/CBNK_APP – Bank payment approval monitor, Approve / reject payments, Dual control & multi‑level approvals BNK_MONI – Bank Communication Monitor, Monitor payment status, File sent / received / rejected F110 – Automatic payment run (most common) F‑53 – Manual outgoing payment (bank transfer) FB03 – Display accounting document FBL1N – Vendor line items (to track paid invoices) FBL3N – Bank & cash account movements FBZ0 – Execute payment run (from proposal to payment) FEBA – Display electronic bank statements FEBAN – Post‑processing bank statements FEBP – Display unprocessed bank statement items FF_5 – Post electronic bank statement FF7A – Cash Position FF7B – Cash Forecast FF7C – Cash Position & Forecast combined FS10N – Bank account balances Advanced Cash Operations — Bank Transfers & Payment MonitoringPerform and track bank transfers Approve and monitor bank payments Monitor bank statement processing status Check cash reports (for example, Check Cash Position, Check Cash Flow Items, Cash Flow Analyzer, Cash Flow Comparison)Fully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FAGLB03, FAGLL03, FB01, FB03, FB04, FB08, FBL1N, FBL3N, FS10N, OB52, S_ALR_*FAGLB03 - Ledger-specific balances FAGLL03 - G/L line items (New G/L) FB01 / FB50 / F‑02 - Post accounting document FB03 - Display accounting document FB04 - Display document changes FB08 - Reverse document FBL1N - Vendor document journal FBL3N - G/L document journal FBL5N - Customer document journal FS10N - G/L balances OB52 - Open / close posting periods OB58 / FSE2 - Financial Statement Version S_ALR_87012284 - Trial balance S_ALR_87012287 - Balance Sheet & P&L Document and Reporting Compliance — Advanced DRC FeaturesEnable visibility of advanced features of SAP Document and Reporting ComplianceFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance AS01/02/03, AW01N, CJ20NAS01 – Create asset master, Choose AuC asset class AS02 / AS03 – Change / Display AuC asset AW01N – Asset Explorer (AuC values, APC, postings), Final settlement execution CJ20N – Maintain settlement rule (project/WBS) Asset Under Construction — AuC Creation & Final SettlementInclude invoice and final settlement for Assets under Construction (AuC) Create AuC assets Settle asset under construction Create assets for complete AuC settlement Maintain settlement rule for final settlement Create legacy AuC assetsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance TPM1, TPM20, TPM40, TPM55, TPM60TPM1 – Close / settle transaction TPM20 / TPM40 – Settlement and posting of realized P&L TPM40 – Execute valuation runs TPM55 – Display valuation results TPM60 – Valuation of Treasury transactions Debt & Investment Management — Group Ledger IFRS ValuationGenerate and post accounting postings Run accruals Perform valuation of financial instruments Reclassify from long term to short term Post realized profit and lossFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance TBB1, TM01/02/03/04, TM20, TPM40, TPM55, TPM60TBB1 – Post accrual accounting entries TM01 – Create Money Market transaction (Investment / Borrowing) TM02 – Display Money Market transaction TM03 – Change Money Market transaction TM04 – Process flow / settlement overview TM20 – Settle Money Market transaction TPM40 – Execute valuation & accrual run TPM55 – Display valuation & accrual results TPM60 – Accrual / valuation run for Treasury transactions Debt & Investment Management — Money Market (FTD, Overnight)Create / Change / Display Fixed Term Deposit (investment and Borrowing Create / Change / Display Overnight Deposit (investment and Borrowing) Settle Money Market transaction Post Treasury transaction (TBB1) Accruals calculation and postingFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance DMEE, F110DMEE – Data Medium Exchange Engine F110 – Automatic Payment Program Bank Integration — SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (MBC)Bank integration - currently using Host to Host.Fully Available as part of the Standard Host-to-Host currently used
Finance F.01, F.13, F-04, FAGL_FC_VAL, FAGLB03, FB01, FB03, FB50, S_ALR_*F.01 – Financial Statements F.13 – Automatic clearing F‑04 – Post with clearing (supports ledger selection) FAGL_FC_VAL – Ledger‑specific postings (when valuation involved) FAGLB03 – G/L balances (ledger‑specific) FAGLL03 – Drilldown by ledger for comparison FB01 / F‑02 – Post G/L document (classic) FB03 – Display accounting document FB05 – Post with clearing (variant with posting screens) FB50 – Enter G/L account document S_ALR_87012284 – Trial Balance S_ALR_87012287 – Balance Sheet / P&L (ledger‑specific) S_ALR_87012301 – Trial balance comparison (ledger / period) Accounting & Financial Close — Group Ledger IFRSAccounting and Financial Close – Group Ledger IFRS Manage Journal Entries Post with Clearing for Ledger Group Run Automatic Clearing Specific to Ledger Groups Trial Balance Comparison Financial Statement Ledger ComparisonFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FAGLL03, FB01, FB02, FB03, FB08FAGLL03 – G/L Line Item Display (New G/L, ledger‑aware) FB01 – Post Document FB02 – Change Accounting Document FB03 – Display Accounting Document FB08 – Reverse Accounting Document Intercompany Financial Posting — Cross-Company Journal EntriesPost general journal entries between two company codes Display, change, or reverse journal entries for cross-company codesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FAGLL03, FB03, FBL3N, FEBA, FEBAN, FF7A/B/C, FFLQCMP, FFLQREPORT, FFLQSD, FS10N, RISKANALYZER, TBB1, TM01–04, TPM*FAGLL03 – New G/L line item display, ledger‑specific (audit and reconciliation use) FB03 – Display FI accounting documents created from treasury postings FBL3N – Display G/L line items, including bank and clearing accounts FEBA – Display Electronic Bank Statements FEBAN – Post‑process bank statements (manual clearing, corrections) FF7A – Displays the current cash position, showing today’s bank balances and immediate liquidity FF7B – Displays the cash forecast, based on expected short‑term inflows and outflows FF7C – Combines cash position and cash forecast in a single view FFLQCMP – Cash Flow Comparison; compares liquidity scenarios (periods, versions, plans) FFLQREPORT – Generates liquidity reports by time bucket, source, and liquidity item FFLQSD – Cash Flow Analyzer; analyzes actual, forecasted, and planned liquidity over time FS10N – Display G/L account balances (commonly used for bank accounts) RISKANALYZER – Market Risk Analyzer for interest rate, FX, and price risk exposure SCDO – Display change documents for treasury‑related master and transaction data SM20 – Display user audit logs (security and compliance review) TBB1 – Post treasury accounting entries (principal, interest, accruals, valuation) to FI TM01 – Create Money Market transactions (Fixed Term Deposits, Loans, Overnight Deposits) TM02 – Display Money Market transactions and contract details TM03 – Change existing Money Market transactions TM04 – Display cash flow and settlement schedule for treasury transactions TPM_MREPV – Currency and market risk exposure evaluation TPM_POSITION – Displays treasury positions and exposure by product and maturity TPM1 – Treasury Transaction Manager; overview of money market and treasury positions TPM40 – Execute valuation and accrual runs for treasury transactions TPM55 – Display valuation and accrual results from treasury runs TPM60 – Calculate interest accruals for treasury instruments TPMMREPV – Interest rate risk evaluation report SAP Fiori Analytical Apps — Treasury & Risk ManagementSAP Fiori Analytical Apps for Treasury and Risk ManagementFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance FB03, FBL3N, FEBA, FEBAN, FF_5, OT83FB03 – Display posted accounting documents FBL3N - Analyze bank G/L items FEBA - Display bank statement FEBAN – Post‑process Electronic Bank Statement FF_5 – Import Electronic Bank Statement OT83 – Configure EBS processing Advanced Bank Statement Automation — Reprocessing Rules & AIReprocess bank statement based on the automated reprocessing rules Propose the reprocessing rules based on the past manual reprocessing actionsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance SECACCOUNT, SECURITY, TBB1, TM01, TM20, TPM*, TPMCATTSECACCOUNT – Create / Change / Display Security Account SECURITY – Create / Change / Display Security Class TBB1 – Post Treasury Business Transactions TM01 – Create Securities Transaction (Purchase) TM20 – Settle Treasury Transaction TPM_POSITION – Securities position and exposure report TPM1 – Treasury Transaction Manager TPM40 – Execute Valuation / Accrual Run TPM55 – Display Valuation Results TPM60 – Accrual Calculation TPMCATT – Maintain Corporate ActionsSECACCOUNT – Create / Change / Display Security Account SECURITY – Create / Change / Display Security Class TBB1 – Post Treasury Business Transactions TM01 – Create Securities Transaction (Purchase) TM20 – Settle Treasury Transaction TPM_POSITION – Securities position and exposure report TPM1 – Treasury Transaction Manager TPM40 – Execute Valuation / Accrual Run TPM55 – Display Valuation Results TPM60 – Accrual Calculation TPMCATT – Maintain Corporate Actions Stock Management — Securities Positions & Corporate ActionsCreate security account and class Create stock purchase transaction Set settlement status Maintain and post cash dividend Create and post corporate action Perform period-end closing Create stock sale transaction Perform reportingFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance SECACCOUNT, SECURITY, TBB1, TM01, TM20, TPM*, TPMCATT Stock Management — Group Ledger IFRS (Key Date Valuation)Create security account and class Create stock purchase transaction Set settlement status Maintain and post cash dividend Create and post corporate action Perform period-end closing Create stock sale transaction Perform reportingPost to General Ledger Perform Key Date ValuationFully Available as part of the Standard —
HR SAP ECC Time Management (On-prem) SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingFully Available as part of the Standard SF Time tracking is the go-to SAP SaaS solution for time management
HR SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Core HR) SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Core HR)Fully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP ECC Payroll (On-prem) SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollFully Available as part of the Standard SF EC Payroll is the go-to SAP SaaS solution for payroll management
HR SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Management SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting ManagementFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Marketing SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting MarketingFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP SuccessFactors OnboardingFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Learning SAP SuccessFactors LearningFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals SAP SuccessFactors Performance & GoalsFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Compensation SAP SuccessFactors CompensationFully Available as part of the Standard SIDF is already using the latest SAP SaaS solution
HR SAP SuccessFactors Succession & Development SAP SuccessFactors Career & Talent DevelopmentFully Available as part of the Standard SF Career & Talent dev. Comprises the SF Succession & Dev module + Opportunity Market place Module
HR SAP Preferred Success HCM SAP Advanced Success Plan for HCMFully Available as part of the Standard SAP Advanced Success Plan is the successor of SAP Preferred Success for HCM
HR My Savings, My Paystubs, Education Allowance, My Assignment SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — Self ServicesSAP SuccessFactors Employee Central ( core HR )Fully Available as part of the Standard these applications can be delivered through SF Employee Central as standard functionality and self services
HR My Attendance SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingFully Available as part of the Standard SF Time tracking can replace my attendance accroding to the evaluation done by the partner
HR Travel Request, Travel Expense, Travel Approval, Misc. Expenses SAP Concur — Travel & ExpenseFully Available as part of the Standard SAP Concur is the go-to SAP SaaS solution for travel and expense management.
HR SIDF HR Letters SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — Self ServicesSAP SuccessFactors Employee Central ( core HR )Fully Available as part of the Standard this application can be delivered through SF Employee Central as standard functionality and self services
HR SAP EREC for SIDF Nokhab Program SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting ManagementFully Available as part of the Standard this application can be delivered through SF Recruiting management as standard functionality
HR Monafasat (Angular Frontend) SAP BTP — HTML5 Repository / Cloud FoundryFully Available as part of the Standard Frontend - Angular Can be deployed on SAP BTP (HTML5 Repository / Cloud Foundry)​ Backend ​ - Option 1: Rebuild using SAP BTP ABAP Environment ​ - Option 2: Rebuild using Node.js on BTP​ - Integration with S/4 Public Cloud: Use released APIs (OData / SOAP) ​
Procurement ME21N, ME22N, ME23N, MIGO, MIR4, MIR7, MIRO, SBWPME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow) Cross-Company Purchasing Organization — PO, GR & InvoicingManage setup of purchasing organizations Manage purchase orders Manage goods receipt Manage invoicesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement MB51, MIGO, MM02MB51 – Material document list (with serial numbers) MIGO - Goods Movement MM02 – Assign serial number profile in material master Serial Number Management — Assignment, History & StatusAssign serial number profiles and serializing procedures Create serial number history Manage status for serialized items Maintain settings for physical inventoryFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement MIGO, MIGO_GRMIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt Core Inventory Management — Scrapping, Blocking & TransfersPerform customer returns scrapping: Goods issue to CO-PA Perform general stock scrapping: Goods issue to cost center Block material – stock transfer unrestricted to blocked Unblock material – stock transfer blocked to unrestricted Unblock material – stock transfer blocked to quality inspection stockFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME29K, ME31K, ME32K, ME33K, SBWPME29K - Approve purchase contract ME31K - Create Contract ME32K - Change Contract ME33K - Display Contract SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow) Purchase Contract — Create, Approve, Monitor & ConvertCreate a purchase contract Make mass changes to purchase contracts Approve purchase contract Monitor notification (optional) Manage source lists Create a purchase requisition Assign requisition and creating purchase order Find purchase documents by requirement tracking number Approve purchase orders Monitor contract item (optional) Post goods receipt Create supplier invoiceFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement MI01, MI02, MI20MI01 – Create Physical Inventory Document MI02 – Change Physical Inventory Document MI20 – List of Inventory DifferencesMI01 – Create Physical Inventory Document MI02 – Change Physical Inventory Document MI20 – List of Inventory Differences Physical Inventory — Count, Recount & Adjust DifferencesCreate physical inventory documents Print physical inventory documents Execute physical count or recount Enter physical count List and post physical count differencesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME21N, ME22N, ME23N, ME2L, MIGO, MIR4, MIR7, MIRO, MM03, MMBE, VL01N/02N/03NME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order ME2L – List Purchase Orders (by number / vendor) MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIR4 – Display Supplier Invoice MIR7 - Park Invoice MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice MIRO – Enter Supplier Invoice (PO‑based) MM03 – Display material master (stock‑relevant views) MMBE – Stock overview (by plant/storage location) SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow) VL01N – Create Outbound Delivery VL02N – Change Outbound Delivery VL03N – Display Outbound Delivery Subcontracting — PO, GI, GR, Invoice & Serial NumbersManage purchase orders Manage stock Manage outbound deliveries Pick and post goods issues Manage goods receipts Manage invoices Serial number processing Manage inbound deliveries Post goods receipt for inbound deliveryFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME21N–ME54N, MIGO, MIR4, MIR7, MIRO, SBWPME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order ME51N - Create Purchase Requisition ME52N - Change Purchase Requisition ME53N - Display Purchase Requisition ME54N - Release Purchase Requisition MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow)ME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order ME51N - Create Purchase Requisition ME52N - Change Purchase Requisition ME53N - Display Purchase Requisition ME54N - Release Purchase Requisition MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow) Consumable Purchasing — PR to PO to GR to InvoiceCreate / Change / Display purchase requisitions Create / Change / Display purchase orders Post goods receipts (MIGO) Create Supplier invoices (MIRO)Fully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement FB03, FBL1N, FBL5N, ME21N–ME54N, MIGO, MIR4, MIR7, MIROFB03 – Display accounting document FBL1N – Vendor line item display (special G/L items) FBL5N – Customer line item display ME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order ME51N - Create Purchase Requisition ME52N - Change Purchase Requisition ME53N - Display Purchase Requisition ME54N - Release Purchase Requisition MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice Procurement of Direct Materials — PR, PO, Stock, Down PaymentsCreate / Change / Display purchase requisitions Create / Change / Display purchase orders Post goods receipts (MIGO) Manage stock Create Supplier invoices (MIRO) Manage down paymentsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME61, ME62, ME63ME61 - Create Supplier Evaluation ME62 - Change / Update Scorecard ME63 - Display ScorecardME61 - Create Supplier Evaluation ME62 - Change Supplier Evaluation ME63 - Display Supplier Evaluation Supplier Evaluation & Performance MonitoringEvaluate suppliers' operational performance Perform evaluation by questionnaire Perform evaluation by user-defined criteria Establish supplier evaluation score historyFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement MIGOMIGO - Goods Movement Cross-Plant Transfer Posting — One-Step & Two-Step TransfersOne-step stock transfer posting Two-step stock transfer postingFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME41, ME42, ME43, ME47, ME48, ME49ME41 - Create Request for Quotation ME42 - Change Request for Quotation ME43 - Display Request for Quotation ME47 - Maintain Quotation (Enter vendor prices) ME48 - Change Quotation ME49 - Price Comparison List Request for Price (RFQ) — Create, Submit, Compare & AwardCreate a request for quotation and automatically submit it to the corresponding suppliers Receive the supplier proposals electronically and automatically create supplier quotations Compare and award the corresponding quotations Create follow-on documentsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME21N, ME22N, ME23N, ML81N, MIRO, MIR4, MIR7, SBWPME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order ML81N - Service Entry Sheet MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice SBWP - Business Workplace (SAP Inbox / Workflow) Procurement of Services — SES Create, Approve & InvoiceCreate / Change / Display purchase requisitions Create / Change / Display purchase orders Create / Change / Display / Approve service entry sheets Create Supplier invoices (MIRO)Fully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME21N–ME54N, MIGO, MIR4, MIR7, MIRO, SBWP Requisitioning — PR Creation, Approval, PO Convert, GR, InvoiceCreate purchase requisition Display my purchase requisition Release / Approve purchase requisition Monitor purchase requisition items Convert purchase requisition to purchase order Release / Approve purchase order Confirm goods receipt (MIGO) Create supplier invoice for single and multiple accounting assignmentFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME61, ME62, ME63 Supplier Classification & Segmentation — Scorecard & AttributesCreate classification scorecard for supplier Create purchasing categories Search suppliers via assigned attributesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME3N, ME9FME3N - Display Purchase Orders List ME9F - Purchase Orders by Vendor Real-Time Procurement Reporting — Spend, Contracts & RequisitionsDisplay urgent contracts, overdue purchase order items, urgent purchase requisition items, or open RFQs with impending submission deadlines Analyze purchasing spend, non-managed spend, and off-contract spend Analyze supplier performance Display purchasing spend or supplier performance in line charts Analyze purchase requisition item types and purchase requisition touch rateFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME9F, ME9K, PUOC_24ME9F - Purchase Orders by Vendor (Part of Fiori app Manage Purchase Orders) ME9K - Scheduling Agreement Output PUOC_24 - Output Management (Part of Fiori app Manage Purchase Orders) Output Management — Forms, Email, EDI & Template BrandingDocument output management requirements Document required communication channels (Print, Email, EDI) Document required document templates (email, forms) Output management setup (printers, email) Customize form templates (add custom fields) Customize master form template (apply corporate branding) Customize email templates Define business rules for output determination Output with attachmentsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement MI01, MI02, MI20 Physical Inventory — Cycle Counting Classification & SchedulingSet cycle counting classification Schedule physical inventory document creation Print physical inventory documents Execute physical count or recount Enter physical count List and post physical count differencesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement ME21N, ME22N, ME23N, MIGO, MIGO_GR, MIRO, MIR4, MIR7ME21N - Create Purchase Order ME22N - Change Purchase Order ME23N - Display Purchase Order MIGO - Goods Movement MIGO_GR - Goods Receipt MIRO - Enter Incoming Invoice MIR4 - Display Invoice Document MIR7 - Park Invoice Complementary Procurement Functions — PO, GR & InvoiceCreate / Change / Display purchase orders Post goods receipts (MIGO) Create Supplier InvoicesFully Available as part of the Standard —
Procurement BD12, MD01–MD10BD12 - Change Pointers for MRP MD01 – MRP Run (Total Planning) MD02 – Single‑Item, Multi‑Level MRP MD03 – Single‑Item, Single‑Level MRP MD04 - Stock / Requirements List MD05 - MRP List MD06 - Collective Stock/Requirements MD07 - MRP Lists by Controller MD09 - Check MRP Availability MD10 - MRP Lists for Material Group Material Requirements Planning (MRP) — Full MRP Run & MonitorManage demand forecast as Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs) manually Calculate from consumption data to forecast and forecast to PIRs automatically Monitor and manage material coverage Run materials requirements planning (MRP) for materials with shortages Evaluate the results of the MRP run Display MRP run material issues and key figures Maintain time-dependent stock levels for safety stock or days of supply for replenishment Hand over the purchase requisitions if needed (optional) Detect and resolve MRP material exceptionsFully Available as part of the Standard —
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ACCRUAL_PROCESSA custom tool that automates the creation and posting of period-end accounting accrual entries in SAP — calculating costs for a selected company, year, and period, then saving all details to a dedicated tracking table for audit purposes. Manage Accruals / Reverse AccrualsManage Accruals; Reverse AccrualsSAP Build Process Automation provides several templates that can significantly accelerate the migration and modernization of your period-end accrual process for S/4HANA Public Cloud. The closest matches are the Mass Automation of Accrual Posting and Accrual Object Creation Approval templates, which cover approval, posting, and integration with S/4HANA. For custom proration logic, you may need to extend these templates or integrate with a CAP/ABAP Cloud service.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — fully replaced by S/4HANA Accruals Management. Dynpro architecture is incompatible with S/4HANA Public Cloud and must be replaced with a Fiori Elements + RAP rebuild.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_AGRI_FUND_PAYMENTA finance tool that records agricultural fund transactions — including fund receipts, insurance payments, and fund payables — by posting them as validated financial accounting documents via the standard SAP FI interface. Journal Entry Posting Approval with AutomationsS/4HANA Public Cloud provides full standard support for the core business scenario (journal entry posting, customer validation, batch processing, and Fiori-based UI), but a complete technical rewrite is required. All classic ABAP GUI/dialog and unreleased APIs must be replaced with their cloud-compliant successors. The recommended extension technology is ABAP Cloud (RAP) for backend logic and Fiori Elements or SAPUI5 for the UI.Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid On-Stack + BTP. Rebuild as RAP BO calling I_JOURNALENTRYTP + Fiori Elements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_AGRI_PAYMENTA custom transaction that allows finance staff to manually enter and post incoming agricultural fund payment receipts as official SAP accounting documents, with built-in loan contract validation and Saudi Riyal currency support. Manage Journal EntriesSAP Build Process Automation offers several templates that can accelerate the migration and modernization of your agricultural fund payment receipt posting process, especially for journal entry posting, batch upload, and approval workflows. For S/4HANA Public Cloud, adapt these templates to use the released APIs and RAP business objects. Loan contract validation may require custom development if no standard API is available.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Full clean core rebuild as Fiori Elements app backed by ABAP Cloud RAP on BTP.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_AMMORTIZATION_PROCESSA quarterly automation program that calculates proportional amortization installments for deferred cost contracts, posts the resulting journal entries directly into the general ledger, updates remaining balances, and displays a full processing log. Quarterly Amortization Processing and GL Journal Entry AutomationAutomated quarterly amortization engine for deferred cost contracts. Calculates proportional installments, posts GL entries, and maintains balance tracking via custom Z-tables. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension. Replace all unreleased SAP standard table reads with released CDS views: VDARL (Loans Management → I_LoanContract or I_LoanPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST (Level D) with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ASSIGNMENT_UPDATEA bulk correction utility that reads assignment field corrections from an uploaded Excel file and applies them in bulk to accounting document line items in SAP, with a preview/simulation mode before committing changes. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Replace classic ABAP report with RAP Business Object actions. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_STATEMENTA read-only financial report that displays Electronic Bank Statement transactions — including amounts, references, and posting statuses — for a given date and bank account in an interactive grid view. Released CDS Viewsreleased CDS viewsS/4HANA Public Cloud provides comprehensive standard features and Fiori apps for viewing and analyzing electronic bank statements and their line items, covering the core business requirements for bank reconciliation, cash management, and audit. For custom Z-table-based EBS data, a Fiori Elements List Report based on a released CDS view or RAP BO is the recommended approach.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud adaptation. Replace with CDS @Semantics annotation. On-Stack refactoring using released CDS views. Level B — only CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_OUTPUT (Classic API, Level B) identified as a finding.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANFER_TICKETA report that transfers SAP bank accounting document line items into an external legacy financial system, formatted as debit/credit ticket transactions for system reconciliation purposes. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side via SAP Integration Suite. FMCA FM unreleased — must be replaced. Side-by-Side re-architecture using SAP Integration Suite — the only viable clean core path.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LETTER_DEDUCA report that generates an official Adobe-format bank transfer authorization letter for payroll and GOSI (social insurance) deduction payments, including Arabic text for amounts in words — tailored for Saudi banking processes. Bank Transfer Letter for Payroll and Social Insurance DeductionsSAP S/4HANA provides robust standard interfaces for the finance/payroll deduction bank transfer scenario. Clean core is supported via CDS views (especially for currency text), business events can replace polling for payroll deduction monitoring, and Integration Suite packages enable end-to-end integration. Custom Adobe Form output and signatory registry integration may require bespoke development or extension.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace TCURT with I_CURRENCYTEXT; Adobe Forms via SAP Forms Service on BTP. Hybrid clean core migration: on-stack refactoring plus side-by-side extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LETTER_DRAFTA report that generates a formal Arabic-language bank transfer authorization letter as an Adobe PDF, pre-filled with payment document data and authorized signatory details for Saudi treasury payment approvals. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Adobe FMs (FP_JOB_OPEN/CLOSE) are Level B — must move to BTP Forms Service. Side-by-Side BTP extension or hybrid On-Stack + BTP approach.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LTR_DED_ELEA Saudi Arabia-specific report that generates a bilingual (Arabic/English) bank transfer authorization letter instructing the company bank to deduct a payment for electricity utility obligations. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Consistent pattern across SIDF bank transfer letter suite. Side-by-Side BTP extension for full clean core compliance. Level D due to unreleased table accesses and classic Adobe Forms API dependency.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LTR_DED_TELA bilingual bank transfer authorization letter generator for telephone bill payments, with automatic signature controls based on payment amount thresholds and support for Arabic-Indic numerals. Bank Transfer Letter for Telephone Bill Payment AuthorizationS/4HANA Public Cloud covers the underlying business process (outgoing payment approval, dual control, payment medium creation) but does not cover the specific output artefact: a bilingual, formally formatted bank transfer authorization letter with Arabic-Indic numerals, Arabic amount-in-words, and house-bank-dependent company text. Custom development on BTP is required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Architecture: I_JOURNALENTRY + I_CURRENCYTEXT + SAP Forms on BTP. Side-by-Side BTP extension for clean core compliance.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LTR_EXT_ENA report that generates formal bilingual (English/Arabic) external bank transfer instruction letters in Adobe PDF format, used by the finance team to authorize outgoing payments to external parties. External Bank Transfer Instruction Letter GeneratorS/4HANA Public Cloud provides the technical foundation (Output Management, custom forms, payment approval workflows, CDS-based data access, extensibility), but does not deliver a standard solution for the External Bank Transfer Instruction Letter Generator scenario. A custom extension (Fiori app, Output Management integration, and custom logic) is required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace all table reads with released CDS views; Adobe Forms to BTP Forms Service. Side-by-Side BTP extension for full clean core compliance.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFER_LTR_OF_CRDTA report that generates an official Adobe-based bank transfer letter for Letter of Credit transactions, including accounting document data, customer and bank details, and authorized signatory information. Bank Transfer Letter of Credit GenerationThere is no single SAP Business AI service that fully replaces the custom ABAP program for generating official, legally formatted, bilingual bank transfer letters for Letter of Credit transactions. A combination of SAP Document AI, SAP Build Process Automation, and AI translation services can be orchestrated as a side-by-side extension on SAP BTP, but will require custom development to meet all legal, formatting, and business process requirements.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) LC data via I_BankGuarantee; vendor via I_Supplier; SAP Forms on BTP. Side-by-Side BTP extension or on-stack ABAP Cloud RAP app.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BANK_TRANSFR_LETTR_EMP_ALWA program that generates official, signed bank transfer instruction letters for employee allowance and GOSI payments, combining accounting documents, HR master data, and bank details into a formatted Adobe PDF. Bank Transfer Letter Generation for Employee Allowance PaymentsThere is no single SAP Business AI service that fully replicates the end-to-end functionality for generating official, signed bank transfer letters for employee allowance payments. A combination of SAP Document AI, SAP Build Process Automation, and SAP Forms Service by Adobe can be orchestrated to deliver a modern, cloud-compliant side-by-side extension using released APIs for HR and finance data.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Full rebuild using released APIs + SAP Forms Service. All Level D eliminated. Full side-by-Side BTP extension using released APIs, Fiori UI, and SAP Forms Service by Adobe.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BCM_ATTACHMENT_DELETEAn administrative utility that allows authorized treasury staff to review and selectively delete file attachments from SAP Bank Communication Management (BCM) payment batches. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) No released OData API for BCM batch attachment deletion — phased hybrid migration. Phased hybrid migration (S+O). Level D driven by a single disqualifier: direct DELETE FROM SWW_CONTOB (SAP-owned standard table).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BCM_STATUS_UPDATEA program that allows treasury administrators to manually override the approval status of Bank Communication Management (BCM) payment batches — marking them as Accepted or Rejected — bypassing the standard workflow. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Replace BNK_BATCH_HEADER reads with released payment batch OData API. Side-by-Side BTP extension as primary path for S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BID_SUMMARIZE_REPORTA Treasury Management report that displays a consolidated view of active financial market bids and offers, including counterparty details, deal terms, and approval status, with the ability to print selected bids as PDF. Treasury Bid and Offer Summarize Report with PDF PrintS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard reporting capabilities for procurement and sourcing, but does not provide a standard Fiori app that directly replicates the bid summarization report. A clean core reimplementation using released ABAP Cloud APIs and Fiori Elements is recommended.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. On-Stack refactor using released ABAP Cloud APIs + Fiori Elements. On-Stack refactoring using released ABAP Cloud APIs and Fiori Elements, or evaluate retirement against standard SAP analytics.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BTL_EXT_BANK_LETTERA program that generates formal external bank transfer authorization letters by linking parked accounting documents to two dynamically selected, date-validated authorized signatories. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-stack refactor for data extraction; SAP Forms Service on BTP for form generation.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BUDGET_CHANGEAn administrative tool used to delete or reassign fund centers on custom budget transfer records in SAP Funds Management — ensuring correct organizational assignment of budget data. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP ABAP Cloud Side-by-Side. Only gap is the classic ABAP report architecture itself. Side-by-Side BTP ABAP Cloud extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BUDGET_PERIOD_REPORTAn interactive multi-screen report that displays budget consumption status across consolidated, consumable, committed, and actual expenditure perspectives — broken down by fund center and commitment item across fiscal periods. Budget Period Report for SAP Funds ManagementS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard Funds Management reporting via Fiori apps and CDS analytical views. The budget period report functionality can be covered by standard FM reporting apps, but custom period-level aggregation logic will require a Fiori Elements List Report backed by a custom CDS view over released FM analytical views.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack refactoring (primary). No Level D violations. On-Stack refactoring (primary) or Side-by-Side BTP extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BUDGET_POSTINGA program that reads approved budget transfer requests from staging tables and posts them as official SAP Funds Management budget transfer documents, then updates the staging records with document numbers and posting status. Budget Transfer Posting to SAP Funds ManagementThe program's interface requirements are well-covered by SAP standard APIs (OData, BAPI), CDS views, business events, Integration Suite packages, and data products. Direct table access (FMIFIIT, FMIOI) can be replaced by CDS views and data products, supporting clean core modernization. Business events and Integration Suite flows enable real-time, event-driven integration.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Use released FM CDS views + OData V2 API for budget creation (replace BAPI_0050_CREATE). Hybrid S+O strategy.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BUDGET_REPORTAn interactive SAP Funds Management report providing real-time visibility into consumable, actual, and committed budget figures by fund center and commitment item, with drill-down to individual transaction details. SAP Funds Management Budget Tracking and Monitoring ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard Funds Management budget reporting via released FM CDS analytical views and Fiori apps. A clean core reimplementation as a RAP-backed Fiori Elements List Report using released FM CDS views is recommended.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. On-Stack RAP backed by released FM CDS analytical views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_BUDGET_REPORT2A multi-screen interactive SAP Funds Management budget status report providing a hierarchical breakdown of consumable, actual, committed, and accumulated-committed budget figures across four drilldown screens. Released CDS Views (FM Analytical)released CDS views mapping directly to all four problematic data sourcesS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard coverage for Funds Management budget status reporting. The program can be directly mapped to released FM CDS analytical views (Proximity 4/5), making On-Stack ABAP Cloud adaptation the recommended migration path with minimal custom development.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Proximity 4/5. Direct mapping to released FM CDS views. On-Stack refactoring to ABAP Cloud RAP backed by released FM CDS analytical views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_CASH_MANAGEMENT_SUMMARYA weekly treasury report that consolidates cash positions including account balances, investment maturities, disbursements, and operating expenses for management review and PDF output. Weekly Cash Management Summary ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides robust treasury and cash management features via standard APIs and Fiori apps. Full re-architecture via RAP APIs and BTP Side-by-Side is recommended, with treasury data accessed via I_FinancialTransaction and cash management analytics delivered through SAP Analytics Cloud.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Full re-architecture via RAP APIs + BTP Side-by-Side. Treasury data via I_FinancialTransaction. Full re-architecture using RAP-based APIs and a Side-by-Side BTP extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_CHEQUE_AND_CASH_RECEIPTA bilingual (English/Arabic) SAP report that generates a printed Adobe Forms receipt — either a cash receipt or cheque receipt — for incoming payments, with two copies: one for the customer and one for the organization. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. CAP or ABAP Cloud + I_JOURNALENTRY + bilingual PDF via BTP Adobe Document Services.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_COST_DISTRIBUTIONAn SAP report that automatically calculates and distributes salary-related costs across departmental cost centers based on active employee headcount, then parks the resulting accounting document using the standard Manage Allocation Cycles process. Manage Allocation CyclesS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard cost allocation and distribution functionality via the Manage Allocation Cycles app. A BTP Side-by-Side reimplementation using released ABAP Cloud APIs is recommended for any custom distribution logic that cannot be covered by the standard allocation cycle framework.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. On-Stack refactor using released ABAP Cloud APIs. On-Stack refactoring using released ABAP Cloud APIs. Evaluate the specific table and FM violations to determine exact effort.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DEF_DOC_UPDATEA finance upload program that reads loan disbursement data from Excel and generates monthly deferred income recognition entries in SAP for Pre-EMI Charges. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Replace Excel upload (Level B) with Fiori file upload; Hijri conversion on BTP. Side-by-Side BTP extension (primary for Public Cloud) or On-Stack ABAP Cloud RAP (for Private Cloud).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DEF_DOC_UPDATE2A program that loads deferred income installment data from an Excel spreadsheet, converting Islamic (Hijri) calendar dates to Gregorian format and calculating round-off adjustments for loan portfolios. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack refactor for ABAP Cloud compliance; retire after single execution.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DEF_INC_TAB_UPDA one-time data correction program that identifies deferred income entries with a blank company code and re-inserts them with the correct company code — used for data cleansing purposes. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Add SAVEPOINT/ROLLBACK + CL_BAL_LOG; retire after one-time correction. On-Stack refactoring for ABAP Cloud compliance.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DEFERRED_INCOME_POSTA program that automates the monthly recognition of deferred income for loan or financing products by creating and parking General Ledger accounting documents for a selected company, fiscal year, and period — using the standard Journal Entry Posting Approval with Automations process. Journal Entry Posting Approval with AutomationsS/4HANA Public Cloud standard functionality fully covers deferred income recognition, journal entry parking, and approval workflows via released APIs, CDS views, and Fiori apps. The overall recommendation is to reimplement the process as a clean core extension using standard APIs and workflow templates, replacing BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML and externalizing hardcoded G/L accounts.Fully Available as part of the Standard Replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML; externalize hardcoded G/L accounts. On-Stack RAP ABAP Cloud refactoring with Side-by-Side elements for workflow orchestration.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DEL_DUPL_BUDGET_RESERVA finance utility that identifies and removes duplicate or erroneous SAP Funds Management budget reservations linked to employee business and training trips by zeroing out their reserved amounts. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Refactor on-stack using released FM APIs. Add duplicate detection + approval control. Add proper duplicate detection logic and approval control.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_DMS_DOCUMENT_LISTA report that displays accounting documents alongside their Document Management System (DMS) attachments — helping users identify which financial documents have associated electronic files and which are missing documentation. Accounting Document DMS Attachment List ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides all the necessary building blocks (released CDS views, APIs, and extensibility options) to fully replicate the business purpose of the legacy Accounting Document DMS Attachment List Report in a cloud-compliant, upgrade-stable way. While there is no single standard Fiori app that matches the legacy report 1:1, the combination of standard APIs and Fiori extensibility means the requirement can be met without core modification.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. I_JOURNALENTRY + API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV replacing BKPF. Side-by-Side BTP extension (primary for Public Cloud) or On-Stack ABAP Cloud RAP (secondary for Private Cloud/On-Premise).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_E_AND_Y_FORMSA program that generates the four primary statutory financial statements (Balance Sheet, Statement of Financial Position, Statement of Changes in Equity, and Cash Flow) for SIDF in a bilingual Arabic/English Adobe PDF format, with Hijri calendar date support. Bilingual Statutory Financial Statements Generator for SIDFS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard financial statement reporting capabilities, but the specific E&Y regulatory form format requires custom extension. Released CDS views (I_BalanceSheetAccountCube, I_FinancialStatementItem) replace direct BSEG access, and Hijri date conversion must be implemented as a BTP utility service.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. I_BalanceSheetAccountCube + I_FinancialStatementItem; Hijri via BTP utility. Complete Side-by-Side BTP redevelopment.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_EMP_SAVINGS_PRGMA Finance report that collects employee payroll posting data and GL account balances to generate a printable Adobe PDF showing each employee's savings contributions per General Ledger account for a selected posting date range. Employee Savings Contributions FormS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard HR and payroll integration via S/4HANA standard functionality. Employee savings program logic requires a hybrid approach: on-stack ABAP Cloud for G/L account data (replacing SKAT with I_GLACCOUNTTEXT), and investigation of released payroll API alternatives for employee savings calculations.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Hybrid. Replace SKAT with I_GLACCOUNTTEXT; investigate released payroll API alternatives.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_FUFINVOICE_PRINTING_MAILA financial report that generates bilingual Arabic/English FUF periodic customer invoices as Adobe PDF with dual Hijri/Gregorian calendar dates, with optional email delivery to customers. FUF Periodic Customer Invoice Printing and Email DispatchS/4HANA Public Cloud provides the standard framework for invoice printing and email dispatch via Output Management and SAP BTP Mail services, but does not provide a standard solution for bilingual (Hijri/Gregorian) FUF invoice printing. Custom logic for Hijri/Gregorian date conversion and bilingual PDF generation must be implemented on BTP.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) I_OpenItemFIDocItem for open items; bilingual PDF via SAP Forms Service on BTP. Side-by-Side BTP extension (primary for Public Cloud).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_GLWF_TRACKINGA Finance report that tracks and displays the multi-level approval status of SAP workflow instances triggered by General Ledger account master data creation and change events. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Replace SWWWIHEAD + SWW_WIRET with I_WORKFLOWSTATUSOVERVIEW CDS views. On-Stack refactoring using released ABAP Cloud APIs and Fiori Elements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_GRIR_CLEARINGA Finance report that enriches GR/IR clearing account line items with procurement contract context — helping finance teams identify which vendors, purchase orders, and contracts have pending goods receipts or outstanding invoice postings. GR/IR Clearing Account Contract Detail ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud standard features cover GR/IR clearing and open item reporting, but do not natively provide the full procurement enrichment in a single report. A custom CDS view and Fiori Elements List Report are required, with all major tables replaced by released CDS views. The solution must be rebuilt using clean core-compliant technologies.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Must migrate ZZPROJNAME custom field to Custom Fields & Logic framework first. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring (primary) using released CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_IC_COCD_UPDA one-time data correction program that identifies incoming payment staging records missing a company code and assigns them the correct target company code. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. One-time data correction. Refactor for ABAP Cloud compliance. On-Stack refactoring for ABAP Cloud compliance.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_BATCH_CREATIONA Finance program that automates the creation of bank payment batches for Intercompany Payment (ICP) transactions received from the MIM-ICP middleware, and writes the resulting batch numbers back into the custom payment tracking table. ICP Bank Payment Batch Creation and TrackingThe ICP Bank Payment Batch Creation program can be modernized and integrated using standard S/4HANA APIs, CDS views, business events, Integration Suite artifacts, and data products. Clean core principles are supported by replacing direct table access with CDS views and OData APIs, and real-time processing is enabled via business events and integration flows.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Hybrid. ABAP Cloud RAP for backend; Fiori Elements UX; replace SAPFPAYM_MERGE SUBMIT with released APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_BULK_PAYMENT_RESPONSEA background program that monitors outstanding bulk payment submissions to Riyad Bank and automatically triggers status enquiry requests for any payment batch that has not received a bank response within 30 minutes. Bulk Payment Response Status Enquiry for Riyad Bank (BCM)S/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard payment batch monitoring and integration via APIs and Fiori apps. A hybrid on-stack ABAP Cloud refactor or BTP Side-by-Side extension is recommended. The core logic is technically simple and suitable for clean core adaptation using released payment batch OData APIs.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactor or BTP Side-by-Side. Core logic is technically simple. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_INVOICE_CREATIONA Finance program that reads approved vendor payment records from a staging table, displays them for review in an interactive grid, and creates posted accounts payable invoice documents in SAP for intercompany company codes. ICP Vendor Invoice Creation from MIM-ICP/SIDF Staging DataS/4HANA Public Cloud covers the core invoice creation functionality via released APIs. A hybrid approach is recommended: replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML for clean core compliance.Fully Available as part of the Standard Replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST (Level D) with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_PAYM_ORDER_CREATIONA program that automatically creates bulk SAP payment orders for validated intercompany payment transactions received from the MIM-ICP/SIDF external platform, and writes the resulting payment order details back to custom tracking tables. Intercompany Payment Order Bulk Creation (ICP/SIDF)While SAP APIs focus on purchase order management, payment order creation is handled by standard reports and tables. CDS views and business events offer clean core and real-time integration options. A full rebuild using released APIs (such as the Payment Proposal API) and Fiori/RAP-based extensions (CAP or ABAP Cloud) is the recommended approach.Fully Available as part of the Standard RAP actions on custom ICP BO; replace BSEG/REGUV reads with I_OperationalAcctgDocItem. On-Stack ABAP Cloud RAP refactoring with Side-by-Side integration for MIM-ICP middleware.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_PAYMENT_STATUSAn FI-BCM report that retrieves vendor payment batch statuses from SAP's banking communication layer and transmits acceptance or rejection outcomes to the Tanafusiya middleware via an outbound web service. Vendor Payment Bank Status Transmission to Tanafusiya MIMS/4HANA Public Cloud covers payment batch monitoring and integration via APIs and Fiori apps, but does not provide direct access to BCM batch item status or a standard outbound interface for the Tanafusiya MIM middleware scenario. The recommended clean core approach is to split the solution: refactor the UI as a Fiori Elements app and re-implement the outbound integration as a side-by-side extension using SAP Integration Suite.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Confirm SAP Banking Services batch scope in Public Cloud tenant before migration. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring using released CDS views and Fiori Elements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_STATUS_REPORTA Finance report that provides authorized AP and Finance staff with a unified, real-time view of every Intercompany/Credit Payment transaction as it progresses through its full lifecycle — from initial creation through bank acceptance or rejection. ICP Payment Process End-to-End Status ReportS/4HANA standard covers payment lifecycle monitoring and analytics, but custom status derivation and duplicate detection require extension via Fiori List Report and released APIs/CDS views. A hybrid on-stack/side-by-side reimplementation is recommended for clean core compliance. Released CDS views and business events can replace direct table access and batch polling for real-time ICP status visibility.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Fiori ALP using RAP + CDS. Confirm Banking Services scope for Public Cloud. Side-by-Side BTP extension (Fiori List Report / Analytical List Page built on ABAP Cloud RAP + CDS).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_STMNT_AUTO_CLEARINGA Financial Accounting report that identifies and automatically clears open vendor documents created by the Intercompany Payment account statement posting process, using the standard Mass Clearing of GL, Customer, and Supplier Open Items approach. Intercompany Payment (ICP) Account Statement Auto ClearingSAP Build Process Automation with the Mass Clearing of GL, Customer and Supplier Open Items template is the closest and most practical starting point for ICP clearing automation on S/4HANA Public Cloud. It will streamline development, ensure cloud compliance, and can be extended for specific business logic. SAP Build Apps can be used for UI and orchestration.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) SAP Build Process Automation 'Mass Clearing of GL/Customer/Supplier Open Items' recommended. Side-by-Side BTP extension for full clean core compliance. Level D due to direct access to forbidden tables and Classic APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_CREATION_BGA scheduled background job that reads intercompany partner vendor creation requests from a staging table, creates vendor master records and bank details in SAP, updates staging results, logs errors, and sends email notifications to a finance distribution list. Automated Intercompany Partner Vendor Creation Background JobAutomated background vendor master creation for ICP partners. Reads from staging, creates vendor and bank records, sends email notifications on completion/error, updates staging status. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Rebuild as ABAP Cloud background job using released Vendor Master APIs (Business Partner API). Side-by-side for email notification via BTP Integration Suite.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) ABAP Cloud background job + Business Partner API; BTP Integration Suite for email.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_REPROCESSA Finance reprocessing report that retries failed Intercompany Partner vendor master creations, updates bank account and IBAN details, logs errors, sends email notifications, and displays results in an interactive grid. ICP Vendor Master Reprocessing with Bank Details and IBAN MaintenanceRetry mechanism for failed ICP vendor master creations. Updates bank/IBAN details for existing vendors and provides ALV-based results with email notification on completion. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-side BTP extension using SAP Build Process Automation for retry orchestration and released Vendor/Business Partner APIs. Retire custom reprocessing ABAP logic.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) SAP Build Process Automation for retry orchestration + released Vendor/BP APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_REVIEWAn interactive Accounts Payable tool for reviewing and approving newly created Intercompany Procurement vendors in SAP, with automated email notification to the AP team upon approval. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Rebuild as RAP Fiori Elements or BTP Fiori app using Business Partner APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INCOMING_PAYMENTSA custom SAP report that uploads incoming customer payment data from Excel, displays it in an editable grid for review, and parks the corresponding accounting documents in SAP while maintaining a custom payment log. Incoming Customer Payments Processing and ParkingNo single out-of-the-box SAP Build template exactly matches the custom incoming payments program. However, several SAP Build Process Automation templates provide 80%+ of the required framework (Excel upload, approval, mass posting, integration with S/4HANA). For S/4HANA Public Cloud, you must adapt these templates to use the released APIs for journal entry parking and ensure all UI/file handling is browser-based (not SAP GUI). SAP Build Apps can be used for custom UI, but backend logic must be iPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Full redesign using released AR APIs. Replace Excel upload with bank statement integration. Full side-by-side BTP redesign using released AR APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INCOMING_PAYMENTS_MPA dialog program enabling SIDF finance staff to record and post multiple customer incoming payments in a single session, automatically creating SAP FI accounting documents. Incoming Payments Multiple Posting for SIDFS/4HANA Public Cloud covers core incoming payment posting but does not provide a standard Fiori app for mass manual entry in a grid; a custom extension is required. The recommended clean core approach is a side-by-side BTP extension or RAP refactoring. Released APIs for journal entry posting must be used; all UI and file handling must be browser-based (Fiori). No single SAP Business AI service fully replaces this custom mass payment posting dialog.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side for multi-entry UX; on-stack RAP for data validation logic. Side-by-side extension is required for multi-entry UX. On-stack RAP refactoring for data validation logic.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INDUSTRIAL_LOAN_BALANCEA consolidated financial report that reconciles industrial loan balances by aggregating GL account balances, bank statement repayments, treasury cash flows, and loan payment categories for a selected fiscal period. Industrial Loan Balance Report for SIDFThere is no single SAP Business AI service that fully replaces the custom Industrial Loan Balance Report. The core data aggregation and reconciliation logic must be rebuilt using released CDS views (I_GLACCOUNTBALANCE, I_GLACCOUNTINCOMPANYCODE), OData APIs, and Fiori/RAP technologies. Standard CDS views replace direct table access (SKA1, SKB1, SKAT, T001). For treasury and loans management data, further investigation into available released APIs is required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack CDS views for data; BTP Fiori for presentation; SAP Forms for PDF.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INDUSTRIAL_LOAN_BALANCE_CMA monthly report that reconciles industrial loan installment payments from SAP Treasury against actual incoming payments recorded in the electronic bank statement system. Industrial Loan Balance Monthly Comparison ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides comprehensive Treasury and Loan Management capabilities for bank statement reconciliation. Standard Fiori apps, CDS views, and ML-based cash application (SAP Cash Application) support the core reconciliation requirements. The SUBMIT-based treasury report calls must be replaced with released API-based equivalents, and direct access to unreleased tables (SKB1, BSAK) must be replaced with released CDS views.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Fiori or on-stack RAP using released TRM and EBS standard APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTER_MEMO_BANK_LETTERA program that generates official Adobe-based bank transfer documents authorizing internal fund movements between company bank accounts, with Arabic language output, Hijri calendar dates, and Eastern Arabic numerals. Inter-Bank Fund Transfer Document Generator (Internal Transfer Memo & Letter)Internal inter-bank transfer authorization document generator. Arabic language output with Hijri dates and Eastern Arabic numerals. Generates formal memo and transfer letter pair. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-stack refactoring for data extraction with side-by-side BTP for form generation. SAP Forms Service replaces custom Adobe Form objects.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack for data extraction; BTP Side-by-Side for SAP Forms Service form generation.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTRATE_CALC_GLCBA program that calculates daily interest on bank account closing balances for a selected period, displays results with both Gregorian and Hijri dates, and parks the resulting interest journal entry in SAP FI. Daily Interest Calculation on G/L Closing Bank BalancesThe SAP S/4HANA ecosystem provides robust APIs, CDS views, business events, integration packages, and data products that can fully support and modernize the interface requirements of the interest rate calculation on GL closing balances program. Standard CDS views (I_GLACCTBALANCE, I_BANKSTATEMENT, I_PARKEDOPLACCTGDOCUMENT) replace direct table access. For interest calculation review and reporting, use CDS views and APIs for GL balances and interest rate instruments.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Core data via released GL balance CDS views; complex interest calc on BTP.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTRATE_ITEMSA Finance report that displays interest rate calculation items stored against General Ledger closing balances, showing statement date, G/L account, debit/credit indicator, closing balance, interest rate, and calculated interest amount. Interest Rate Calculation on GL Closing BalancesSAP S/4HANA provides robust APIs, CDS views, business events, integration packages, and data products for GL and interest rate reporting. Most direct table access in custom ABAP reports can be replaced with standard interfaces, supporting clean core and future-proofing. For interest calculation review and reporting, use CDS views and APIs (I_GLACCTBALANCE, I_FININTRSTRATEADJMTSTATUS) for GL balances and interest rate instruments.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_JV_PRINT_PROGA program that retrieves posted and parked accounting documents and renders them as structured PDF Journal Voucher forms with full line-item details, account descriptions, and long texts. Finance Journal Voucher Print ProgramJournal voucher PDF generator for posted and parked FI accounting documents. Full line-item detail with GL account descriptions, cost centers, and document long texts. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Build as side-by-side extension using CAP or ABAP Cloud with released FI Document APIs. SAP Forms Service by Adobe replaces on-stack Adobe Form dependencies.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side with CAP/ABAP Cloud + released FI Document APIs + SAP Forms Service.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_KAFALA_DISTA custom SAP report that collects actual Controlling costs for Kafala cost centers and creates a parked accounts receivable document in Financial Accounting to record the Kafala distribution charge. Kafala Distribution Cost Posting to Accounts ReceivableS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard financial document distribution and intercompany posting via released journal entry APIs (I_JOURNALENTRYTP). Custom Kafala fee distribution logic must be rebuilt as a RAP-based BTP extension or on-stack ABAP Cloud program, using released APIs for posting and CDS views for reporting. Direct access to BKPF and BSEG must be replaced.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released CO + AR APIs. Rating D due to custom table + direct CO access. On-stack ABAP Cloud migration using released CO and AR APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_DETAILED_REPORTA detailed analytical report providing a full lifecycle view of Letters of Credit, covering financial status, disbursement tracking, past-due obligations, HR-linked consultant details, and processing performance metrics. Letter of Credit Detailed ReportComprehensive LC lifecycle report combining FI document data with HR consultant profiles, disbursement tracking, and performance KPIs including past-due obligation aging. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-stack CDS views for LC data aggregation; side-by-side Fiori app for the multi-panel analytical view.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack CDS for LC data; BTP Fiori for multi-panel analytical view.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_DOC_REPORTA finance report providing a consolidated view of all Letter of Credit documents linked to customer loans, showing lifecycle statuses, outstanding balances, bank charges, and due date change history. Letter of Credit Document Status Report for Loan DisbursementsLC document status report for loan-linked LC instruments. Shows lifecycle status, outstanding balances, bank charges accrued, and full history of due date amendments. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-side BTP Fiori app using released LC and Customer APIs.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Released LC + Customer APIs. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC apps first. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app using released LC and Customer APIs. Standard S/4HANA LC management apps may cover core requirements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_MANAGEMENT_REPORTA consolidated reporting tool for monitoring active Letter of Credit positions, showing original amounts, disbursements, remaining balances, and reductions per customer across company codes. Letter of Credit Management ReportActive LC position management report showing original amounts, cumulative disbursements, remaining balances, and reduction schedule per customer and company code. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required.
