Migration path: Side-by-side BTP Fiori app. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC Monitoring Fiori app coverage before building custom report.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC Monitoring Fiori app before building custom. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_SD_REPORTA consolidated grid report providing a full portfolio view of active Letters of Credit, combining accounting documents, loan disbursement data, open receivables, and HR consultant profiles into a single operational overview. Letter of Credit Details Report for Loan Co-ordination & Service DepartmentS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard Letter of Credit (LC) management via Treasury APIs and released CDS views. Standard integration packages (SAP S/4HANA Integration with Bank) and data products (Letter of Credit Portfolio, Loan Disbursement Analytics) support reporting. A clean core reimplementation using released LC APIs and Fiori Elements List Report is recommended, replacing direct access to VDARL, BKPF, and related tables.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack CDS for aggregation; BTP Fiori for dept view; People APIs for HR profiles.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_STATUS_REPORTA report that monitors and summarizes the lifecycle status of Letters of Credit issued against customer loan accounts, categorizing each instrument as Open, Waiting, Fully Paid, or Expired. Letter of Credit Lifecycle Status ReportLC lifecycle status monitor categorising instruments into Open, Waiting, Fully Paid, and Expired states. Financial aggregates per category for management overview. Significant refactoring required. Standard S/4HANA partially covers the scenario; a clean core extension is recommended. Migration path: On-stack refactor using released LC CDS views and ABAP Cloud. Close standard coverage gap — S/4HANA LC status Fiori app may serve as near-equivalent.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released LC CDS views. Evaluate S/4HANA LC Status Fiori app as near-equivalent. On-stack refactor using released LC CDS views and ABAP Cloud.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LOAN_REPAYMENTA Finance report that collects and aggregates loan repayment transactions from the SAP accounting ledger for a specified date range and generates a printed Adobe Form — either a Loan Repayment Statement or a Cheque Review Statement. Loan Repayment and Cheque Review Statement GeneratorS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard loan repayment processing via Treasury and Loan Management APIs and released CDS views. Custom loan repayment logic (VDARL table access, BSEG line item reads) must be replaced with released loan management APIs and I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM CDS view. A hybrid on-stack or side-by-side BTP extension is recommended for clean core compliance.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms Service for statements; released Customer Line Item APIs replace BSID. Side-by-side BTP extension with SAP Forms Service for statement rendering.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_MODIFY_TABLE_CONTENTA Finance utility program that mass-updates the company code assignment on all legacy credit/debit ticket records in the SAP staging table to ensure correct organizational classification of historical financial transactions. Legacy Credit/Debit Ticket Company Code Mass UpdateS/4HANA Public Cloud does not support direct table modification for SAP standard tables. For customer Z-table maintenance, the recommended approach is a custom Fiori Elements app backed by a RAP Business Object (CDS view + behavior definition), which provides a browser-based, cloud-compliant replacement for classic ABAP table maintenance utilities. All direct MODIFY/DELETE/INSERT on non-Z tables is prohibited in the ABAP Cloud environment.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Execute once, validate, retire.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_OPEN_GL_UPLOADA finance upload tool that reads journal entry data from a local Excel file and mass-posts accounting documents (GL, AR, AP) into SAP FI — replaced by the standard Upload General Journal Entries app. Open GL Journal Entry Mass Upload from ExcelS/4HANA Public Cloud supports GL journal entry upload via the Upload General Journal Entries Fiori app and the released Journal Entry API (I_JOURNALENTRYTP). The custom GL upload program's direct BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST usage must be replaced with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML. File upload must be browser-based (not SAP GUI). A side-by-side BTP extension or on-stack ABAP Cloud refactoring is recommended.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Migrate to S/4HANA Mass Upload or SAP Central Finance journal upload APIs. Migrate to standard SAP S/4HANA Mass Upload (SBWP/MDG) or SAP Central Finance journal upload APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_OUTGOING_PAYMENTSA program that reads outgoing vendor payment data from an Excel file and posts them as Financial Accounting documents in SAP — aligned with the standard Automatic Payment Program (F110). Standard Fiori App (F110)S/4HANA Public Cloud covers mass payment processing and journal entry upload, but does not provide a standard app for uploading vendor payment instructions from Excel and posting them as FI documents in one step. A RAP-based posting service and Fiori/BTP UI is required, replacing all classic ABAP and unreleased BAPI usage. The recommended and only released API for posting financial documents is the Journal Entry RAP Business Object (I_JOURNALENTRYTP), exposed via the OData V4 service API_JOURNALPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor + released Payment APIs. Consider standard F110 as direct replacement. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Payment APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PAYMENT_ORDER_SUM_FORMA finance program that collects procurement-to-payment data for a given payment batch and generates a structured Adobe Form Payment Order Summary used for formal vendor disbursement authorization. Payment Order Summary Form for Vendor Disbursement AuthorisationSAP Build Process Automation provides strong templates for approval workflows and S/4HANA integration, but you will need to extend these with custom PDF generation and advanced UI logic for the Payment Order Summary Form. The recommended approach is to use SAP Build Process Automation for workflow, SAP Build Apps for UI, and integrate with S/4HANA Public Cloud via released APIs. For PDF output, leverage SAP BTP Adobe Document Services.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Released FI Payment + MM Purchasing APIs + SAP Forms Service by Adobe. Side-by-side BTP extension using released FI Payment and MM Purchasing APIs. SAP Forms Service by Adobe for PDF generation.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PAYMENTS_FILE_TRANSFERZFI_PAYMENTS_FILE_TRANSFER — MT940 Bank Statement Automated Posting – Riyad Bank Payment Reconciliation
A program that retrieves daily MT940 bank statements from Riyad Bank via web service, parses payment transactions, and automatically posts the corresponding accounting documents in SAP for vendor payments, customer loan repayments, payroll disbursements, and bank-to-bank transfers.		 ZFI_PAYMENTS_FILE_TRANSFERSAP Build Process Automation provides strong templates for journal entry posting, mass upload, and open item clearing, which can be adapted for the bank statement file transfer and FI posting scenario. MT940 parsing and bank integration will require custom development (CAP/ABAP Cloud or Integration Suite) as there is no out-of-the-box template. All direct table access (BSEG, REGUP, LFA1, BNK_BATCH_ITEM) must be replaced with released CDS views and APIs.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite iFlow for MT940; S/4HANA Bank Statement Import for posting.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PERCENTAGE_REPA Finance analytical report that retrieves SADAD electronic billing records and displays key performance indicators per customer and bill — including paid bill percentage, remaining balance, and return request percentage. Percentage Report on Return Requests and Paid Invoices (SADAD Billing)S/4HANA Public Cloud standard functionality does not cover this custom SADAD billing analytics data, but the report can be fully modernized using a CDS-based Fiori Elements Analytical List Page, replacing the classic ALV UI and aligning with clean core principles. The overall clean core rating is C due to use of an unreleased ALV function module, but a straightforward refactoring will achieve full compliance.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori analytics using SADAD APIs. Consider SAP Analytics Cloud for KPIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori analytics app using SADAD integration APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PROJECT_BUDGETA financial oversight report consolidating project budgets, purchasing contracts, purchase orders, delivery progress, and invoiced amounts by fund center and commitment item. Project Budget and Contract Monitoring ReportIntegrated project budget monitoring covering FM budgets, MM contracts/POs, delivery progress, and invoice amounts by fund center. Cross-module financial progress report. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Evaluate standard S/4HANA Project Financial Monitoring Fiori apps. Custom side-by-side BTP Fiori app if SIDF-specific fund center/commitment item structures require custom logic.Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate standard S/4HANA Project Financial Monitoring Fiori apps first.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PROJECT_BUDGET2An interactive report that reconciles approved project budgets against contracts and purchase orders, showing financial progress across expense categories for a given fiscal year. Project Budget vs. Procurement Reconciliation ReportProject budget-to-procurement reconciliation ALV report. Compares approved FM budgets against contracts and POs by expense category for fiscal year financial progress tracking. Significant refactoring required. Standard S/4HANA partially covers the scenario; a clean core extension is recommended. Migration path: Side-by-side BTP Fiori app with released FM and MM APIs. Clean core rating C reflects moderate custom table dependency and standard API availability.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Released FM + MM APIs. Rating C due to moderate custom table dependency. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app with released FM and MM APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_R_DIS_PAY_UPD_ITMTXTA finance report that automatically composes and updates standardized item texts on loan disbursement payment accounting document lines — embedding document date, loan reference, and an Arabic description. Disbursement Payment Document Line-Item Text UpdateS/4HANA Public Cloud does not support direct BSEG updates (write operations on posting tables). The recommended approach is to reverse and repost the affected documents using the released Journal Entry API (I_JOURNALENTRYTP) with the corrected item text. A BTP Side-by-Side extension using ABAP Cloud orchestrates the mass reversal and reposting process for clean core compliance.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack ABAP Cloud using released FI Document Change APIs; Arabic text in released class. Arabic text composition logic encapsulated in released utility class.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_R_VDARL_GREG_HIJIRIA Finance report that retrieves loan contract draw-down dates from SAP Loans Management and displays them side-by-side in both Gregorian and Hijri calendar formats, with an option to download results to Excel. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Released Loans Management APIs + BTP calendar conversion for Hijri/Gregorian.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_BALANCE_REPORTA financial reconciliation report comparing customer installment and fee balances between SIDF's legacy loans management system and the SAP-integrated SADAD national bill-payment platform. SADAD Balance Reconciliation ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides all the building blocks (released CDS views, APIs, extensibility, Fiori UI paradigms) to support a clean, cloud-compliant redesign of the SADAD Balance Reconciliation Report. The core business scenario (financial reconciliation, customer billing, reporting) is covered, but the specific cross-system comparison and legacy integration require custom extension development. A side-by-side BTP extension using CAP, Integration Suite, and Fiori Elements is recommended.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori reconciliation app using SADAD Integration Suite + released FI/Loans APIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori reconciliation app using SADAD Integration Suite APIs and released FI/Loans APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_INSTALLMENT_INVOICEA Finance report that retrieves SADAD installment billing data for selected customers and either prints a formatted PDF invoice or displays an interactive billing summary on screen. SADAD Installment Invoice Generation and Billing ReviewS/4HANA standard covers customer, address, and billing/invoice output via released APIs and Fiori apps, but SADAD-specific logic and Z-table data require a custom extension. A side-by-side BTP rebuild or on-stack refactor is needed to achieve clean core compliance due to direct KNA1 access. Released CDS views (I_CUSTOMER, I_INVOICELIST) must replace all direct table access.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Hybrid. On-stack refactor for SADAD data; BTP Side-by-Side for invoice PDF via SAP Forms Service.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_LEGACY_ACCNT_UPDATEA migration program that enrolls pre-existing SAP loan customers into Saudi Arabia's SADAD electronic bill payment network by registering them as new billing parties with dual Gregorian and Hijri calendar date tracking. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for SADAD API connectivity.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_PAYMENTSTATUS_REPORTA finance report displaying SADAD payment notification statuses, showing whether received payments have been successfully converted into SAP accounting documents. SADAD Payment Status Monitoring ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard Fiori apps and features that cover the core business scenario of monitoring incoming payments, including filtering, posting status, document numbers, and export. SADAD-specific integration and status logic is not standard and requires a custom extension using CAP/ABAP Cloud and custom CDS views. Classic ALV/Dynpro is not available and must be replaced by a Fiori List Report or custom Fiori app.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released SADAD APIs. Evaluate standard SADAD integration monitor Fiori app. On-stack refactor using released SADAD integration APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_PROCESSSTATUSA daily KPI monitoring report that consolidates success and rejection rates across all three SADAD electronic payment processes — Bill Upload, Payment Notification, and Bank Reconciliation. SADAD Electronic Payment Process Status Monitoring ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard process monitoring capabilities. The Insight To Action Process SAP Build template is the closest match, supporting real-time monitoring, error handling, and workflow restart for custom processes like SADAD bill upload, payment notification, and bank reconciliation. SADAD-specific Z-table data must be exposed via OData or API calls and integrated into standard monitoring workflows.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack ABAP Cloud for KPI calc; BTP Fiori analytics dashboard for management.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_REPROCESSA report used to recover and retransmit failed customer account and bill upload transactions to Saudi Arabia's national SADAD electronic billing and payment platform. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-stack retry logic + Integration Suite for SADAD API calls. Retire custom web service proxy. On-stack retry logic with side-by-side Integration Suite for SADAD API calls.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SAMA_REPORTA report that collects General Ledger account balances and generates Page 5 of the Saudi Arabian Monetary Authority (SAMA) regulatory financial statement as an Arabic-language Adobe Form with Gregorian and Hijri calendar dates. SAMA Regulatory Financial Statement Page 5 ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides robust General Ledger and financial statement reporting capabilities via standard Fiori apps and CDS views. The SAMA regulatory financial statement (Page 5) requires custom extension: a side-by-side BTP extension using released GL CDS views (I_GLACCOUNTBALANCE) and SAP BTP Adobe Document Services for PDF generation is recommended, as the custom Arabic-Indic form rendering is not available in standard.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms Service for Arabic regulatory form; released GL balance CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SPELL_AMOUNTA finance utility that converts numeric monetary amounts into their full Arabic written-word representation in Saudi Arabian Riyals (SAR) — used on cheques and official financial documents. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Convert to released ABAP Cloud utility class or BTP shared API service (used by many bank letters).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_STATASTICAL_REPA Financial Accounting report that analyzes posted payment transactions by payment method, showing each method's share of total transaction count and total payment amount across a user-selected posting date range. Statistical Report for Payment MethodsA CDS analytical view stack (Basic Interface, Cube, Query) over I_JOURNALENTRY and I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM can replace all custom SQL. The percentage derivations can be expressed as calculated measures, eliminating the ABAP percentage loop. VBSEGD (parked documents) has no released CDS successor; verify with the business whether parked-document scope is mandatory before building the replacement.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released FI payment document CDS views. Evaluate standard Payment Analytics Fiori app. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released FI payment document CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TB_GM_REPORTA custom financial report that generates a formatted Trial Balance for a specified company code and reporting date, mapping general ledger balances to a predefined account structure — rendered as an Adobe Form with Arabic-Indic numeral support. Trial Balance GM Report with Arabic Form OutputThe S/4HANA interface landscape for ZFI_TB_GM_REPORT is rich and well-supported by standard APIs, CDS views, business events, integration packages, and data products. Clean core principles are fully achievable by replacing direct table access with CDS views and OData APIs. The custom Arabic-Indic numeral output and account mapping logic require a BTP Side-by-Side extension.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side + SAP Analytics Cloud for trial balance; SAP Forms Service for localized PDF.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TB_GM_REPORT_2A formatted Trial Balance report for management that aggregates general ledger account balances by company and date, rendered via SAP Adobe Form with full Arabic numeral localization. General Manager Trial Balance Report with Arabic LocalisationS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard trial balance reporting via Fiori apps and released GL CDS views. The second version of the Trial Balance GM Report requires the same clean core rebuild path: released CDS views (I_GLACCOUNTBALANCECUBE) for data access, and SAP BTP Adobe Document Services for bilingual Arabic form output, in a side-by-side extension.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate SAP Analytics Cloud for Arabic localisation support. Side-by-side BTP solution. Evaluate SAP Analytics Cloud for management trial balance with Arabic localisation support.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TRIAL_BALANCEA financial accounting report that generates a General Ledger trial balance for a company code as of a selected date, showing both posted and parked document balances per G/L account — rendered as an Adobe Forms PDF. General Ledger Trial Balance Report with Parked DocumentsS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard trial balance and general ledger reporting via Fiori apps (Analyze ADB Trial Balance KPIs) and released CDS views. For custom account mapping and Arabic output, a clean core reimplementation using released GL CDS views (I_GLACCOUNTBALANCECUBE, I_GLACCOUNTTEXT) and SAP BTP Adobe Document Services for the custom Arabic form is required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. I_TrialBalance CDS views; parked documents via released VBKPF/VBSEG APIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app using standard Trial Balance CDS views (I_TrialBalance).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TRM_FD_REVENUEA multi-view SAP Treasury report that calculates and presents fixed deposit interest revenue with interactive grid output and bilingual English/Arabic Adobe Forms PDF generation. Fixed Deposits Revenue Reporting ToolFixed deposit interest revenue report from SAP TRM (Treasury and Risk Management). Multi-view ALV with bilingual Adobe PDF generation for English and Arabic audiences. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-stack refactor using released TRM Product CDS views; side-by-side for bilingual PDF via SAP Forms Service by Adobe.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack with released TRM Product CDS views; BTP Side-by-Side for bilingual PDF.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_UNAMORT_DEF_INCOMEA finance report that retrieves and displays unamortized deferred income entries for loan disbursements across a rolling five-year window, with quarterly and half-yearly subtotals — rendered as an Adobe PDF. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms for PDF; released Deferred Revenue CDS views replace custom table access. Side-by-side BTP Fiori analytics app with SAP Forms Service for PDF.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_ITEM_DETAILSA Financial Accounting report providing a pre-configured view of vendor line items filtered exclusively to Transfer document types for a fixed company code — a controlled entry point into the standard SAP Vendor Line Item Display (FBL1N). Vendor Transfer Document Line Items Display (FBL1N Gateway)S/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard vendor line item reporting via released CDS views (I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM, I_SUPPLIERLINEMSTATUS). A clean core reimplementation as a Fiori Elements List Report backed by a RAP read-only service using released AP CDS views is recommended. All direct access to BSEG and LFA1 must be replaced.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Retire — replace with standard FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display) with variant. Retire and replace with standard FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display) with variant.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_MASTERA Finance report that displays comprehensive vendor master data including address, banking/IBAN details, VAT registration, payment terms, and compliance certificates for a specified company code and vendor selection. Vendor Master Data Consolidation ReportS/4HANA Public Cloud provides comprehensive vendor (supplier) master data management via the Business Partner model and released CDS views (I_SUPPLIER, I_BUSINESSPARTNER). All direct access to LFA1, LFB1 must be replaced with released CDS views and OData APIs. A clean core reimplementation using Manage Suppliers standard app or a Fiori Elements extension is recommended.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released Vendor/BP CDS views. Evaluate Manage Business Partners Fiori app. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Vendor/Business Partner CDS views and APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_PAYMENT_REPORTAn Accounts Payable report that consolidates vendor payment run results with vendor master details, clearing document information, and live bank transmission status into a single interactive grid. Vendor Payment Report with Bank Monitoring StatusS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard vendor payment reporting via released CDS views (I_SUPPLIERPAYMENTSTATUS, I_APMPAYMENTORDER). A Fiori Elements List Report backed by released AP payment CDS views is the recommended clean core reimplementation. All direct access to REGUP, BSEG, and LFA1 must be replaced.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released AP Payment + BCM status CDS views. Evaluate standard Payment Monitor. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released AP Payment and BCM status CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_PAYMENTSA program for finance staff to review pending vendor payment records in an editable grid and post them as official SAP FI accounting documents. Vendor Payment Entry and FI Document PostingS/4HANA Public Cloud provides robust standard features for vendor payment processing via released APIs and standard Fiori apps. The Payment Proposal API and I_JOURNALENTRYTP support clean core vendor payment posting. Direct access to REGUP, BSEG, and classic ALV must be replaced with released CDS views and Fiori Elements for full cloud compliance.Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. On-stack RAP Fiori Elements for review; BTP Side-by-Side for payment authorization + bank comm.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_REJECTA stub program for contract rejection in SAP MM with no active logic — fully replaced by the standard Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app (F2705A) with flexible workflow for approval and rejection. Standard Fiori App F2705AStandard Fiori App (F2705A)The ZMM_CONTRACT_REJECT program exists only as a stub with no implemented logic. Standard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionality, including the Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app and flexible workflow, fully covers contract rejection scenarios. The recommended clean core approach is to retire this stub, as no custom development is needed. Configure the standard flexible workflow for purchase contract approval and rejection; train procurement users on the Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app (F2705A) with flexible workflow. Retire immediately. No custom development is needed.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_NOTIFICATIONA scheduled report that monitors SAP purchase contracts for upcoming and past expiry dates, categorizes them by urgency, and sends branded HTML email notifications to stakeholders including purchase requisition approvers. Contract Expiry Reminder NotificationDaily/yearly contract expiry notification engine sending categorized HTML emails with company branding to PR approvers, material owners, and procurement managers. Reads EKKO/EKPO and supports Gregorian calendar with fiscal year boundaries. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-Side BTP extension. Replace EKKO/EKPO direct reads with I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 CDS views.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Side-by-Side BTP extension. Replace EKKO/EKPO direct table reads with I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 released CDS views and SAP Integration Suite for email notifications.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_RPT_NEWA comprehensive contract monitoring report consolidating contract headers, line items, purchase order history, goods receipts, invoices, and Funds Management budget breakdown data across 12 custom expense categories. Purchasing Contract Monitoring and Utilisation ReportCross-module contract monitoring reading from EKKO, EKPO, EKKN, EKBE, LFA1, MSEG, RBKP, BSEG, CSKT, T024, T161T, and FMFCTRT. Provides 86+ output columns including 36 FM budget category columns driven by ZMM_CONTRACT_ITM. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-Side BTP rebuild consuming I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTITEMAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01, I_SUPPLIERINVOICEAPIFully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Rebuild using I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 + I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_REPORTA background report that monitors purchase order bank guarantee expiry dates, categorizes them by urgency, and sends email notifications with Excel attachments to configured recipients. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-stack: I_BankGuarantee + CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. BTP Side-by-Side for Excel email via Integration Suite.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_REPORT2A read-only interactive report displaying active bank guarantees with full procurement context, linking guarantee records to purchase orders, purchase requisitions, and vendor master data. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-stack: I_BankGuarantee replacing AKKP/AKKB. Fiori Elements replaces REUSE_ALV_GRID.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_UPDATEA background program that automatically identifies expired bank guarantees and updates their status to Expired in the documentary payment system — designed to run as a daily scheduled job. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Store custom status in Z-extension table; I_BankGuarantee for reads. On-stack refactor: store custom status in a Z-extension table rather than AKKP append. Use I_BankGuarantee CDS view for reads.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAILA background program that monitors bank guarantee expiry dates and sends categorized email notifications with Excel attachments to configured recipients. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-stack or BTP Side-by-Side. Replace AKKP/AKKB with C_BankGuaranteeOverviewQry. Hybrid on-stack refactor or side-by-side BTP.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAIL_2An enhanced version of the bank guarantee validity email notifier with improved HTML email body construction, updated recipient handling, and modern email output format. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Same migration path as ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAIL. BTP preferred for Public Cloud compliance. Side-by-side BTP preferred for full public cloud compliance.
MM (Custom) ZMM_RFX_BANK_GUARANTEE_FORMA program that generates formatted Adobe Form letters to banks for confirmation, revision, transfer, or return of bank guarantees associated with RFX procurement events — with bilingual English/Arabic output and Hijri calendar dates. Bank Guarantee Development Form for RFX ProcurementGenerates bilingual bank guarantee correspondence for RFX events. Retrieves quotation response data, converts dates to Hijri calendar, resolves domain value texts for guarantee status/type, and prints Adobe Form PDF with dynamic title derived from status description. Significant refactoring required. Standard S/4HANA partially covers the scenario; a clean core extension is recommended. Migration path: Replace unclassified DD_DOMVALUES_GET domain text FM with a custom CDS view or Z-table. MigratePartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace DD_DOMVALUES_GET with custom CDS view or Z-table. Targeted on-stack refactoring (rating C). Replace unclassified DD_DOMVALUES_GET domain text FM with a custom CDS view or Z-table.
MM (Custom) ZMM_ROLES_UPDATE_RPTA background report that automates mass assignment or removal of SAP authorization roles for user groups within Materials Management, reading target user/role combinations from a configuration table. User Roles Update Background ReportReads configuration from custom Z-table and applies via SUSR_USER_CHANGE_PASSWORD_RFC or equivalent. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Use released IAM APIs. Consider SAP Cloud Identity Services for role assignment. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Identity and Access Management APIs.
MM (Custom) ZMM_PERFORMANCE_REPORTA procurement performance report that tracks the complete purchase-to-pay cycle from purchase requisition creation through purchase order approval, goods receipt, service entry, and invoice verification — including all workflow approval dates and approver names. Procurement Performance Report (Purchase-to-Pay Cycle Tracking)Maximum standard proximity (5/5) but full rebuild required due to direct unreleased table access and custom bilingual reporting. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Rebuild as ABAP Cloud side-by-side or on-stack RAP using released CDS views: I_PurchaseRequisitionAPI01, I_PurchaseOrderAPI01, I_MaterialDocumentItem, I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01. Fiori Elements List Report replaces classic ALV.Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. ABAP Cloud using I_PurchaseRequisitionAPI01 + I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01.
MM (Custom) ZMM_INVOICE_STATUS_REPORTA read-only report displaying the processing status of vendor invoice documents — Posted, Deleted, or Pending — and identifying the workflow approvers currently responsible for pending invoices. MM Invoice Status Report with Workflow Recipient IdentificationConsolidates RBKP invoice status with live workflow recipient identification via SAP_WAPI_WORKITEM_RECIPIENTS. Shows Posted/Deleted/Pending status and the name of the current approver for each pending invoice — enabling AP period-end close oversight. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-side BTP extension using I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 for invoice data and workflow OData APIs for recipient iPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 for data + workflow OData APIs. Fiori Elements replaces classic ALV. Side-by-side BTP extension using I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 for invoice data and workflow OData APIs for recipient identification.
MM (Custom) ZMM_GET_PO_APROVALA report that retrieves and displays the current approval level and release status of purchase orders, identifying which release group and code has approved or is pending approval for each selected PO. Purchase Order Approval Level DisplayReads PO release information via BAPI_PO_GETRELINFO for each PO in the selection range. Displays release group, release code, approver assignment, and approval status. Useful for procurement managers tracking PO approval progress. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-stack refactor using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 CDS view for PO data and released workflow CDS views (C_WorkflowTaskAnalytics) for apprFully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + C_WorkflowTaskAnalytics; replace BAPI_PO_GETRELINFO.
MM (Custom) ZMM_MIRO_SCR_ENHNA custom screen enhancement embedded in SAP Invoice Verification (MIRO/MIR7) that presents a live Saudi government regulatory compliance dashboard for the invoice vendor and enforces a mandatory acknowledgement before an invoice can be parked. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Full reimplementation as CAP + Fiori Elements side panel. SAPGUI module pool not in Public Cloud.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_PR_CREATEA custom SAP MM report that converts approved Request for Proposal (RFP) records into standard SAP Purchase Requisitions, supporting both goods and service document types. P2P RFP to Purchase Requisition CreationS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard purchase requisition creation via released APIs (API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV) and Fiori apps. The custom RFP-to-PR creation logic (reading from custom P2P RFP tables and creating PRs via BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE) must be refactored to use the released Purchase Requisition OData API. The commented-out workflow completion logic should be re-evaluated and implemented as a RAP business object action for clean core compliance. Replace BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE withFully Available as part of the Standard Replace BAPI_PR_CREATE with CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 OData V4 PATCH; Integration Suite for RFP workflow. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing BAPI_PR_CREATE with CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 OData V4 PATCH.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKINGAn interactive tool for purchasing supervisors to view open purchase requisitions, assign Purchasing Unit Heads and Coordinators to PR line items, and automatically notify assigned coordinators by email — aligned with the standard Fiori App F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility). Fiori App F2047AFiori App F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility)Maximum standard proximity (5/5) — S/4HANA Fiori App F2047A (Responsibility Management) fully covers this requirement. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Retire and replace with standard S/4HANA Fiori App F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility).Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility) + Responsibility Management.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKING_EDIAn enhanced version of the PR coordinator assignment tool with additional filtering options, improved bulk assignment interface, and bilingual Arabic/English email notifications — aligned with the standard Fiori App F2047A. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalitySame standard proximity (5/5) — S/4HANA standard fully covers the base requirement. Retire unless confirmed EDI-specific gap requires a targeted side-by-side extension. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Retire: use standard F2047A Responsibility Management. If confirmed gap with EDI-specific dual-role propagation, implement minimal side-by-side BTP extension using CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 ODFully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard F2047A. Minimal BTP extension if EDI dual-role gap confirmed. Retire: use standard F2047A Responsibility Management.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKING_BEDA further variant of the PR coordinator assignment program supporting BED (Basic Engineering Design) procurement category with enhanced filtering and coordinator assignment capabilities — aligned with the standard Fiori App F2047A. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalitySame architecture and standard proximity (5/5) as base version. Retire path strongly recommended. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Retire: configure Responsibility Management for BED category-specific coordinator assignments. S/4HANA standard fully covers the requirement via F2047A.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — configure Responsibility Management for BED category. Standard fully covers requirement. Retire: configure Responsibility Management for BED category-specific coordinator assignments.
MM (Custom) ZMM_UPDATE_ONBHLF_PRA utility report that updates the custom "On Behalf Of" field on purchase requisition line items — replaced by the standard S/4HANA "On Behalf Of" functionality supported natively during PR creation. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalityS/4HANA Public Cloud supports 'shopping on behalf of' natively — the custom field approach should be retired. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Retire: use S/4HANA standard 'On Behalf Of' functionality (supported during PR creation via standard process).Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use S/4HANA standard 'On Behalf Of' functionality. Expose ZZONBHLF via Custom Fields if needed. Retire: use S/4HANA standard 'On Behalf Of' functionality (supported during PR creation via standard process).
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_STATUSA read-only report providing a consolidated view of all active and historical Request for Proposal (RFP) records, including current workflow approval status, responsible party, SLA deadline, and breach indicator for procurement governance. RFP Header Details and Approval Status Report for ManagementS/4HANA standard covers payment lifecycle monitoring and analytics, but the custom RFP lifecycle, custom SLA matrix, and custom approval routing tables have no standard equivalent and must be preserved. The standard Fiori procurement monitoring apps cover standard document types only and cannot substitute for this report. The recommended clean core path is On-Stack refactoring to RAP and Fiori Elements, or Side-by-Side on SAP BTP, with CDS views replacing direct custom table access.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. RAP read-only BO with Fiori Elements List Report.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_TEC_MEM_UPDAn interactive procurement report that allows authorized administrators to view and update Technical Committee and Qualification Committee Member assignments on Munafasat (competitive tender) RFP records, with real-time HR-based user validation. Munafasat RFP Technical and Qualification Committee Member UpdateEditable ALV allowing procurement administrators to correct Technical and Qualification Committee Member assignments on Munafasat RFP records. HR validation confirms user existence before save. Name enrichment from HR master data stored against RFP. Significant refactoring required. Standard S/4HANA partially covers the scenario; a clean core extension is recommended. Migration path: On-stack RAP refactoring: rebuild as editable Fiori Elements List Report using ABAP Cloud. Replace PA-table-basedPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-Stack RAP. Editable Fiori Elements List Report. Replace PA-table HR validation with I_BusinessPartner API. On-stack RAP refactoring: rebuild as editable Fiori Elements List Report using ABAP Cloud.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_BOQ_CUTOVERA one-time cutover utility that back-fills project identifiers and financial commitment item codes into existing Bill of Quantities records by cross-referencing RFP requisition data and project budget master records. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Execute once, validate, retire. Minimal refactoring needed. Execute once, validate data, retire.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_APPRV_NOTIFA background program that monitors RFP workflow approval queues and sends bilingual HTML email notifications to approvers when RFP documents are awaiting their action, including SLA deadline information. RFP Workflow Approval NotificationS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard workflow notification capabilities for purchase requisitions and purchase orders via flexible workflow, but does not provide multi-level SLA escalation notifications for a custom RFP workflow with custom approval routing tables and custom SLA matrix. Released CDS views (I_WorkflowInstance, C_WorkflowTaskAnalytics) can replace direct custom workflow table access. A BTP Side-by-Side extension using SAP Build Process Automation is recommended for the notificatPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) On-stack: CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. BTP Alert Notification Service for Public Cloud compliance. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing BCS legacy classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_FILES_CUTOVERA one-time cutover utility that migrates RFP-associated document files from the SAP application server to a FileNet content management system, reading file metadata from custom tables and calling the FileNet REST API for each document. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for FileNet HTTP. Migrate Z-table file registry to BTP. Side-by-Side BTP: use SAP Integration Suite for FileNet HTTP connectivity. Migrate Z-table file registry to BTP-managed entity.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_STATUS_REPORTA procurement report that displays the real-time workflow approval status of tender requests, including the responsible committee, approver role, approver name, and SLA deadline — enabling monitoring of SLA breaches in the committee approval process. Procure-to-Pay Committee Tender Approval Status ReportThe standard S/4HANA workflow deadline features and the flexible workflow framework provide partial inspiration but no replacement for this committee-centric, multi-column SLA breach view. Custom development is required. The recommended clean core path is On-Stack refactoring to RAP and Fiori Elements, elevating the existing utility class ZCL_ZMM_P2P_CMT_UTLTY to ABAP Cloud compliance and replacing classic ALV with a Fiori Elements List Report.Fully Available as part of the Standard Read-only Fiori Elements List Report. Replace CL_SALV_TABLE with CDS annotations.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERA background report that monitors active purchase-to-pay tenders, identifies overdue approvals exceeding SLA thresholds, and automatically sends bilingual HTML email notifications to responsible approvers and committee heads. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace CL_BCS/* with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE; assess WWW_HTML_MERGER. On-Stack refactoring: replace CL_BCS/CL_DOCUMENT_BCS/CL_SAPUSER_BCS/CL_CAM_ADDRESS_BCS with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_DISPLAY_LOGA read-only report that retrieves a specific committee log entry by GUID and renders its full JSON payload in human-readable format for audit, compliance, and traceability purposes. P2P Committee Audit Log Display (JSON Viewer)S/4HANA Public Cloud provides extensive workflow-based approval and monitoring for procurement documents using the Flexible Workflow framework, but does not natively cover a single-record JSON viewer for a custom committee audit log table. A clean core side-by-side extension using CDS, RAP, and Fiori Elements fully addresses this requirement. The recommended rebuild exposes ZMM_P2P_CMT_LOG as a RAP-managed read-only entity and replaces CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with a standard Fiori Elements Object Page orPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori Elements / RAP read-only app. Replace CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with Fiori JSON viewer. Side-by-Side BTP Fiori Elements or RAP read-only app. Replace CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with proper Fiori JSON viewer.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_VNDR_DELA data-cleansing program that removes a specific vendor's commitment entry from the custom Procure-to-Pay commitment register for a given tender, identified by Tender ID and Vendor ID. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. RAP BO with deleteVendorCommitment action + Fiori Elements confirmation dialog.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_WF_LOGCUTOVERA multi-mode production cutover utility that corrects committee workflow log step assignments, updates table data, generates placeholder vendor bids for testing, and corrects RFP department codes in workflow logs. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack refactoring only. All 6 tables are customer-owned — no SAP standard table migration needed. All 6 tables are fully customer-owned — no SAP standard table migration needed.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_FILES_CUTOVERA one-time cutover utility that migrates committee procurement document files from the SAP application server to a FileNet content management system, with per-file REST API calls and bulk table writeback of FileNet GUIDs. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for FileNet; migrate to BTP Document Service or S/4HANA DMS API. Side-by-Side BTP: SAP Integration Suite for FileNet connectivity.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_COC_FILE_UPLOADA batch upload program that reads an Excel file containing Certificate of Conformance (COC) document metadata and mass-creates linked Document Management System records in SAP, attaching them to corresponding accounting documents. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. Replace BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 with API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV. Build Fiori upload app. Side-by-Side BTP: replace BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 with API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV OData API.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_COC_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERA background report that monitors outstanding Certificate of Conformance submissions in the P2P process, identifies those exceeding SLA deadlines, and sends bilingual HTML email notifications to responsible parties. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace BCS email classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE; assess WWW_HTML_MERGER.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CON_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERA background report that monitors active purchase-to-pay contracts, identifies overdue approvals exceeding SLA thresholds, and automatically sends bilingual HTML email notifications to responsible approvers and line managers — using the standard SAP Build Process Automation P2P Contract SLA Breach Notifier template. P2P Contract SLA Breach NotifierSAP Build Process Automation provides several templates and actions that can significantly accelerate and streamline the implementation of the P2P Contract SLA Breach Notifier for S/4HANA Public Cloud. The Service Confirmation Notification and Insight To Action Process templates are the closest matches and can be adapted, minimizing custom development and ensuring clean-core compliance. SAP Build Apps can be used for custom UI or integration, but the core notification logic is best handled in PrPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Hybrid S+O. On-stack: replace 4 BCS classes + WWW_HTML_MERGER; BTP Alert Notification for Public Cloud.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_PGM_CONTRACTS_SYNCA background synchronization program that reads newly released SAP purchasing contracts, looks up their associated P2P RFP records, and creates corresponding P2P contract records with initial workflow approval log entries. P2P Program Contracts SynchronisationS/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard purchase contract management and synchronization capabilities via the Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app and released OData APIs (API_PURCHASECONTRACT_PROCESS_SRV). However, the specific P2P contract synchronization logic (reading released contracts from CDHDR/EKKO/EKPO, enriching with custom RFP and manpower data, and writing to custom P2P tables) is not covered by standard features. A hybrid on-stack plus side-by-side extension using released APIs for coFully Available as part of the Standard Replace EKKO/EKPO/LFA1 reads with I_PurchaseContractAPI01; use CE_PURCHASECONTRACTEVENTS. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing EKKO/EKPO/LFA1/ADRC direct SELECTs with I_PurchaseContractAPI01 CDS view.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_BUDGET_PERIOD_UPDAn interactive report allowing authorized budget administrators to view, allocate, and distribute budget amounts across fiscal periods for cost centers in the P2P process, with editable grid and Funds Management budget integration. P2P Budget Period Allocation MaintenanceInteractive budget period allocation tool for P2P cost center budgets. Editable ALV grid for period-by-period budget distribution. FM integration for commitment item/cost center hierarchy. F4 value help for cost center selection. Saves to custom Z-table and optionally to FM budget. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Replace direct FM table access with I_FMCOMMITMENTITEM CDS views.Fully Available as part of the Standard On-stack RAP editable table using released FM APIs; BTP Side-by-Side for SAC analytics.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_EVAL_FORM_TESTA form generator that assembles all committee evaluation data — vendor bids, member assignments, workflow dates, meeting narratives, and HR organizational details — into a structured header for Adobe Form printing of the official tender evaluation document. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) BTP Side-by-Side. CAP service aggregating Z-table data via OData APIs; Adobe Form to SAP Forms Service. Side-by-Side BTP: rebuild as CAP service aggregating Z-table data via released OData APIs.
MM (Custom) ZMM_R_VAT_REPORTA cross-module report that retrieves purchase order VAT/Zakat tax amounts from pricing conditions and displays them alongside vendor, PO header, and account assignment data for Saudi Zakat compliance reporting. Purchase Order VAT (Zakat) ReportPO VAT/Zakat reporting tool. Reads EKKO/EKPO for PO header/items, KONV for pricing condition tax amounts (MWST), NAVS for tax procedure, LFA1 for vendor data. Displays VAT amounts per PO line item for Saudi Zakat compliance reporting. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Hybrid: on-stack refactor using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 CDS views. KONV direct access is the primary LPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01; replace KONV with I_PurgDocPricingElement. Hybrid: on-stack refactor using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 CDS views.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BANK_GUARANTEE_FORMA program that generates and prints formatted bank guarantee documents (Confirmation, Revision, Transfer, Return) as Adobe PDF Smart Forms for bank submission, with bilingual Arabic/English support. —Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) Full BTP re-architecture. Replace AKKP/AKKB with I_BankGuarantee CDS view. Full side-by-side BTP re-architecture.
MM (Custom) ZMM_PO_ANALYTICSA comprehensive MM report providing a consolidated real-time analytical view of purchase orders — covering procurement, delivery, invoicing, and payment status in a single interactive grid — aligned with standard Fiori analytics. Standard Fiori App (T024)Highest standard proximity (5/5) — S/4HANA standard analytics apps and CDS views cover nearly all requirements. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: Side-by-Side BTP using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 (EKKO), I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 (EKPO), I_PurOrdAccountAssignmentAPI01 (EKKN), I_PurchaseOrderHistoryAPI01 (GR/IR), I_MaterialDocumentItem_2 (goods movements), I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 (invoices), I_ClearedVeFully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_MaterialDocumentItem + I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_RPTA read-only grid report that consolidates purchasing contract header details, vendor data, release status, financial values, released purchase orders, invoiced amounts, and delivery percentages into a single procurement overview screen. Purchasing Contracts Consolidated ReportHighest standard proximity (5/5) — S/4HANA standard Fiori apps and CDS views cover nearly all requirements. Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core extension is required. Migration path: On-stack ABAP Cloud rebuild as Fiori Elements List Report using I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTITEMAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01, I_SUPPLIER CDS views. Standard Fiori apps (Manage Purchase Contracts F0842A, Central Purchasing AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 + Fiori Elements. Evaluate retirement before investing.
MM (Custom) ZMM_ROLES_UPDATE_RPT_BGA background-capable report that automatically provisions SAP authorization roles to employees on both the local backend SAP system and a remote frontend system, driven by a custom HR role-mapping configuration table based on the employee's organizational subgroup. Automated SAP Authorization Role Assignment by Employee Organizational SubgroupAutomates SAP user authorization role assignment for active employees (PA0000 status 3) in subgroups AD/AC/AB/BC/BB. Reads HR infotypes PA0000, PA0001, PA0105. Looks up role mapping from custom ZHR_ROLES_MAINT table. Backend roles assigned via BAPI_USER_GET_DETAIL, BAPI_USER_ACTGROUPS_ASSIGN, SUSR_SYNC_USER_TABLES. Frontend (SPG/portal) roles via RFC call to ZHR_MSS_FRONT_END_ROLES. Results displa Significant refactoring required. Standard S/4HANA partially covers the scenario; a clean core exteFully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. PA infotype tables don't exist in Public Cloud — HCM runs in SuccessFactors. Side-by-Side BTP extension required.
MM (Custom) ZMM_INVOICE_FROM_POA program that identifies fully-approved custom purchase orders without invoices and automatically parks AP invoice documents in SAP after interactive user confirmation — reducing manual AP effort in the procure-to-pay cycle. Automated Invoice Parking from Approved Purchase OrdersAuto-identifies ZCPO purchase orders with frgke=R (fully released) and procstat=05 (fully approved) that have no invoice lines in RSEG. Presents candidates in interactive ALV for user selection. Confirmation popup via CL_SALV_TABLE before commit. Parks AP invoices via BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_PARK per selected PO with automatic tax calculation (NAVS condition). Reads EKKO, EKPO, KONV, RSEG — all Level Standard S/4HANA does not cover this scenario in its current form. A full rebuild as a clean core eFully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace EKKO/EKPO with I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01; replace RSEG duplicate check. On-stack ABAP Cloud rebuild: replace EKKO/EKPO reads with I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01/I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01 CDS views.
PP (Custom) Z_PP_MM_PGM — PO & Contract Print Program (Adobe PDF)A custom SAP output program that collects purchasing document data, calculates pricing including VAT and discounts, and generates formatted PDF documents via Adobe Forms for standard POs, service POs, and procurement contracts. Purchase Order and Contract Print Program (PDF Output via Adobe Forms)The S/4HANA standard interfaces (APIs, CDS views, business events, integration packages, and data products) fully cover the functional scope of the Z_PP_MM_PGM custom print program. Clean core principles are supported by replacing direct table access with CDS views and APIs, and real-time integration is enabled via business events and Integration Suite artifacts. Analytics and reporting are facilitated by standardized data products. No single SAP Business AI service fully replaces the custom ABAFully Available as part of the Standard Full BTP re-architecture: CAP + CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001 + CE_PURCHASEORDEREVENTS + SAP Forms Service.
PP (Custom) Z_PP_MM_RFQ — PO Print with Bilingual PDF & Approval VerificationA SAP output-message-driven program that collects all purchase order data, verifies approval status, converts amounts to words, and renders a formatted bilingual Arabic/English PDF document via SAP Adobe Forms. Purchase Order Print Program with Bilingual PDF Output and Approval VerificationSAP S/4HANA Public Cloud provides standard functionality for purchase order output management, approval workflow, and PDF generation using SAP Forms by Adobe. Language-specific form variants are supported, and custom forms can be developed to achieve bilingual output. All data access must use released APIs and CDS views, and all processing is managed via Fiori apps and the Output Management framework. Custom development (using CAP or ABAP Cloud) may be required for: bilingual (Arabic/English) foFully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid S+O. Standard S/4HANA Output Management + BTP CAP for bilingual PDF + SAP Forms by Adobe.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ATTENDANCEEmployee Attendance Data Migration \u2013 IT2010 to IT2002 — A program to migrate employee attendance records from the Employee Remuneration infotype (IT2010) into the standard Attendances infotype (IT2002) in SAP HCM, supporting SuccessFactors Employee Central replication. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This migrates attendance records from IT2010 to IT2002. This is a one-time data migration utility needed only during system cutover from SAP HCM to SuccessFactors. SAP BTP can handle the data transformation and migration during implementation. It is not required as ongoing SaaS functionality post-migration.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFIT_CHANGEEmployee Benefit Enrolment Change Administration — A custom HR administration program for applying, previewing, and posting employee benefit enrolment changes including contribution adjustments, withdrawals, temporary withdrawals, and revocations, with integrated SAP workflow triggering and test-run mode. SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Standard SuccessFactors Benefits supports contribution adjustments, withdrawals, temporary withdrawals and revocations natively. Map the existing custom logic to standard Benefits configuration and EC workflows; only org-specific approval rules or validations should be moved to a side-by-side BTP extension (SAP Build Apps / Build Process Automation) — keep the core clean.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFITS_CALCEmployee Benefit Contribution Calculator — An HR report that calculates and displays employee benefit entitlements including basic pay, individual and employer contribution shares, and service-based totals for selected employees in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Benefits) + Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This calculates employee benefit entitlements including basic pay and allowances. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Benefits handles benefit plan configuration and eligibility, while EC Payroll manages the actual contribution calculations and payroll deductions. Partially available because complex Saudi-specific benefit calculation logic may need BTP extension.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFIT_RESG_BGJBAutomatic Return Savings Processing for Temporary Withdrawal — A background job that automatically re-enrolls employees into their benefit plan when their approved Temporary Withdrawal period exceeds one year without manual action. SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Automatic re-enrolment after a Temporary Withdrawal expiry is delivered by configuring SuccessFactors Benefits eligibility and effective-dated rules. Where standard Benefits rules cannot fully cover the 1-year auto-return logic, complement with a scheduled process in SAP Build Process Automation calling the SuccessFactors APIs — no ABAP background job required.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ABSENT_REPORTEmployee Absence Report with Dual Calendar (Gregorian & Hijri) — A custom SAP HR report for SIDF that identifies and lists employee absences within a selected date range, displaying results with Islamic (Hijri) and Gregorian dates alongside grade, job title, division, and supervisor information. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports employee absences with both Gregorian and Hijri calendar dates. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off manages absence data, and People Analytics provides reporting. The Hijri calendar display and specific Arabic formatting may require configuration or a minor BTP extension for localization rendering.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ABSENT_REPORT_2002Employee Absence Report from IT2002 — A custom SAP HR report for SIDF that extracts and displays employee absence records from HR Infotype PA2002 for a user-selected period with organisational hierarchy navigation. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This extracts and displays absence records from infotype 2002. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off stores all absence/attendance data, and People Analytics can build equivalent reports. BTP extension may be needed for specific formatting, navigation hierarchy, or localized display requirements matching the original custom report.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFIT_ENROLLAutomated First-Time Benefits Enrollment for Newly Hired Employees — A batch HR program that automatically enrolls eligible newly hired employees into the company benefits scheme by creating benefit enrollment records for those processed under the custom hiring action ZA. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Benefits)Fully Available as part of the Standard This automatically enrolls newly hired employees in benefits plans. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Benefits module provides automated benefit enrollment triggered by new hire events using business rules. Eligibility determination, plan assignment, and enrollment are standard EC Benefits features requiring only configuration.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFIT_NOTIFEmployee Savings Program Enrollment Email Notification — An automated HR notification report that sends bilingual English and Arabic HTML enrollment emails to employees newly enrolled in SIDF Employee Savings Program, with duplicate prevention marking. SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Standard SuccessFactors workflow notifications and Document Generation cover bilingual (English/Arabic) HTML email templates and duplicate-prevention via the workflow engine. Use a custom template if bilingual side-by-side layout is required; orchestrate via SAP Build Process Automation only if business rules go beyond standard EC capability.
HR (Custom) ZHR_APNTMNT_ACT_MAILHR Appointment Action Reminder Email Notification — An automated SAP HR report that sends bilingual English and Arabic HTML reminder emails to supervisors when an employee appointment action requires review within a configurable number of days. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends bilingual email reminders when appointment actions require supervisor review. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services provides rule-based alert notifications triggered by HR events (e.g., contract end dates, appointment actions). Bilingual HTML email notifications can be configured using standard EC alert templates without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ADVANCE_PAYMENT_RPTHR Advance Payment Posting Report — A report for payroll administrators to review, select, and post approved employee travel advance payments as off-cycle infotype records into SAP Payroll. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This enables payroll administrators to review and post travel advance payments. SAP Concur Travel & Expense manages travel requests including advance payment workflows. Integration with Employee Central Payroll handles the actual advance posting to payroll. BTP extension may be needed for the specific approval workflow and off-cycle posting logic.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ADVANCE_PAYMENT_RPT_1HR Travel Advance Payment Reporting and Posting Tool (v2) — A program that identifies approved employee travel requests, displays them in an interactive ALV grid, and enables HR administrators to post advance salary payments into the payroll system for eligible trips. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This identifies approved travel requests and posts advance salary payments. SAP Concur handles travel request approval, and its integration with EC Payroll supports advance payment processing. The interactive ALV-style selection and posting interface may need BTP extension to replicate the specific user workflow.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BANK_FILE_DOWNLOADPayroll Bank Transfer File Generation (SIDF Submission) — Generates a formatted bank transfer file from SAP payroll results for bulk salary disbursement submission to Saudi banks, conforming to the SIDF payroll bank standard. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTP (for bank file formatting)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This generates a formatted bank transfer file from payroll results. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll processes payroll and generates payment outputs. SAP BTP handles the transformation into the specific bank file format (SIDF submission format) required by Saudi banks, as the exact local format may differ from standard output.
HR (Custom) ZHR_1RHSTRU00HR Organizational Structure Display and Maintenance — An interactive ALV column-tree report for visualizing, navigating, and maintaining SAP HR organizational structures, based on a company-specific enhancement of the standard SAP report RHSTRU00. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Position, people Org Charts and company structure overview) + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays and maintains organizational structures. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central provides Position Org Chart, People Org Chart, and Company Structure Overview as standard features for org visualization and navigation. People Analytics enables custom org structure reporting. No rebuild is needed — this is core EC functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_PAYROLLLufthansa Flight Schedule Demo Report — A demonstration report that retrieves and displays Lufthansa flight schedule data from SAP SPFLI demo table using Native SQL, with no active payroll or HR business logic despite its HCM namespace registration. SAP BTP + SAP BDCFully Available as part of the Standard Demo program with Native SQL on the SPFLI demo table — zero HR/payroll business value and a clean-core violation. Report can be built using BDC and integrate with the table using BTP
HR (Custom) ZHCM_F_023_CRSVSalary Payment Summary Report for Bank Transfer (CR-SV/Real Payment) — A payroll report that generates formatted salary payment summary documents (CR-SV or Real Payment) for submission to the bank to authorise bulk employee salary transfers at the end of each payroll period. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) CR-SV / Real Payment summary documents for bulk salary transfer are produced by the standard ECP bank-transfer (DME) programs and Payroll Control Center reports. Localized payment-medium formats are delivered by SAP; only the bank-specific file layout, if any, should be configured via standard DME workbench or a BTP-side extension — not as a clone of the legacy report.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_F_008_BANKFILEBank File Salary Transfer Form — Generates a formatted bank transfer instruction document for salary disbursement, including employee IBAN details, per-bank subtotals, and a grand total in words, rendered as an Adobe Form printout. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTP (for bank file format generation)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This generates a bank transfer file for salary disbursement. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll handles payroll processing and standard payment file generation. SAP BTP is needed to transform the output into the specific Saudi bank format (e.g., SARIE/SADAD) required by the customer's bank, as the exact format is not available out-of-the-box.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_BANKLETTER_SMEBank Payment Letter Generation for SME Payroll Disbursement — A report that generates a formal Adobe Forms-based bank instruction letter for salary payments, grouping employee payment details by bank with subtotals and expressing the grand total in Arabic words in Saudi Riyal currency. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace the custom Adobe Form with a SuccessFactors Document Generation template (or an Adobe Document Services template on BTP) driven by the standard ECP pre-program DME run. SME-specific grouping, subtotals and grand-total-in-words can be modelled in the template parameters without modifying the core.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_OFF_BANKLETTERPayroll Bank Letter Generation for Salary Disbursement — A custom SAP HCM report that generates a formal PDF bank letter instructing banks to process employee salary payments for a given payroll period, tailored for Saudi Arabian payroll operations. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) ECP includes Saudi Arabia localization for salary disbursement. Generate the formal bank letter via SuccessFactors Document Generation (or Adobe Document Services on BTP) consuming the standard payroll posting results; retire the custom Adobe Form.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_BANKLETTERPayroll Bank Letter Generator for Salary Disbursement Authorization — A program that generates a formal print-ready bank letter listing employee net salaries, IBANs, and payment dates grouped by receiving bank, enabling the Payroll Administrator to authorize salary transfers with Saudi banking institutions. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Net-salary listings, IBANs and payment dates grouped by bank are produced by standard ECP bank-transfer programs. The print-ready letter format is a Document Generation template; no custom ABAP report required.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_TR_AUTOHCM Travel Expenses Auto-Posting to Off-Cycle Payroll — A report that retrieves approved employee trip records, displays them in an ALV grid for review, and automatically posts off-cycle payroll payments via HR Infotype 0267 while triggering SAP Travel Expense settlement. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This posts approved travel expenses as off-cycle payroll payments. SAP Concur handles travel expense approval and processing. Its integration with EC Payroll supports off-cycle payment posting. BTP extension may be needed for the specific off-cycle triggering logic and settlement workflow matching the current custom behavior.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_TE_AUTO_1Travel Expense Automation and HR Payroll Integration (v1) — An HCM report that retrieves approved employee travel expense trips, presents them in an ALV grid for reviewer selection, and automatically posts reimbursable amounts as Infotype 0267 payroll wage-type records while marking each trip as settled. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This retrieves approved travel expenses and posts them as payroll wage-type records. SAP Concur manages expense approval workflows natively, and its integration with EC Payroll handles reimbursement posting. BTP extension may be needed for custom wage type mapping and the ALV-style reviewer selection workflow.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_TE_AUTO_1_SFTravel Expense Automated Settlement and Payroll Posting — A report that automates the end-to-end settlement of approved employee travel expense claims by mapping expense items to HR payroll wage types and posting them to HR infotype PA9002 for payroll processing. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP ConcurFully Available as part of the Standard End-to-end travel-expense settlement is delivered by Concur + the standard Concur → ECP integration package, which maps expense items to payroll wage types automatically. Custom Infotype 9002 and the Z-report become obsolete; configure the standard mapping in Concur and ECP instead.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_TE_AUTO_2HCM Travel Expense Auto-Posting to Payroll (v2) — An automation report that reads approved employee travel expense trips, displays them in an editable ALV grid, and automates posting of expense amounts to HR payroll as Infotype 0267 wage type entries, while triggering payroll accounting runs and clearing Funds Management budget reservations. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This automates travel expense posting to payroll including Funds Management budget clearing. SAP Concur handles expense management, EC Payroll processes payments, and SAP BTP can orchestrate the Funds Management budget reservation clearing via S/4HANA APIs if still required in the new landscape.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_EMPLEAV_UPLOADSAP HCM Employee Master Data Synchronization to Legacy HR System (KSA) — A background synchronization program that extracts employee master data from SAP HCM infotype tables and pushes it into a legacy HR system database, keeping both systems aligned for Saudi Arabia HR operations. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This custom ABAP program synchronizes employee master data to an external legacy HR system. Since the target is a non-SAP legacy system, SAP BTP is required to build an integration flow that extracts employee data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via standard OData/SFAPI and pushes it to the legacy database. No pre-built standard integration content exists for this specific legacy target.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_CYEAR_RATINGEmployee Current-Year Performance Rating Upload — A program to upload annual employee performance ratings from an Excel file into SAP HCM for use in SuccessFactors processes. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Annual performance ratings are captured directly in SuccessFactors Performance & Goals. For any one-off bulk load from Excel, use the standard SuccessFactors Import / Integration Center or an Integration Suite iFlow — no custom ABAP uploader is needed.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_F006_EMP_CLEARANCEEmployee Clearance Form Generation and Notification — A program that generates an Adobe Forms PDF of an employee clearance form and sends an approval or rejection email notification to the employee upon completion of the clearance process. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Offboarding / Termination process) + SuccessFactors Document Generation for the clearance PDF + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Use the standard SuccessFactors Offboarding process to drive the clearance workflow. Generate the clearance form via Document Generation; orchestrate approver routing and notifications in SAP Build Process Automation. Retire the custom Adobe Form program.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_R005_EMP_MAILEmail Notification of Employee Messages (Time Evaluation) — A program that automatically sends HTML-formatted email notifications to employees about their time evaluation messages generated by the SAP Time Management evaluation process. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking + SAP BTPPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Time-evaluation messages are surfaced to employees and managers directly through SuccessFactors Time Tracking's standard message framework and to-do alerts.
