Push-email of the same content can be added with SAP Build Process Automation triggered by Time Tracking events — no SAPscript/HTML mail report needed.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_EMPLOYEE_EXTENSION_AL11Employee Phone Extension Extract for SuccessFactors (AL11 Output) — An SAP HCM report that extracts employee phone extension data from the Personnel Communications infotype and generates a semicolon-delimited CSV file saved to the SAP application server for SuccessFactors Employee Central upload. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralFully Available as part of the Standard Retire immediately. SuccessFactors is the system of record in S/4HANA Public Cloud; PA0105 infotype access is unavailable. Only a short-term transitional integration may be needed during migration.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_EMPLOYEE_EXTENSION_SFTPEmployee Extension Data File Transfer to SuccessFactors via Secure HTTP — A program to securely transfer employee extension data files between SAP HCM and SAP SuccessFactors via HTTPS, with optional file-level encryption and decryption using SAP digital certificate framework. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This program transfers employee extension data files to SuccessFactors via SFTP/HTTPS. SAP BTP replaces the custom ABAP file transfer logic by providing managed SFTP connectivity and prebuilt SuccessFactors adapters. The BTP iFlow can be configured to handle encryption, file formatting, and scheduled delivery natively.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_PEND_TRAVEL_REQUEST_AL11Pending Travel Request Export to SuccessFactors Time Sheet (AL11) — A report that extracts pending SAP Travel Management requests, expands them into daily records, and exports a date-stamped CSV file to a shared server path for import into SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Sheet. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This extracts pending travel requests and exports them to SuccessFactors Time Sheet. SAP Concur replaces legacy SAP Travel Management for travel request management, while Employee Central handles time recording. Integration between Concur and EC Time Off/Time Tracking may require BTP extension for the specific CSV export logic to SuccessFactors Time Sheet.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_PENDING_TRAVEL_REQUEST_SFTPPending Travel Request Export to SuccessFactors via SFTP — A report that extracts pending SAP Travel Management requests, expands them into daily records, and transfers the resulting CSV file to SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Sheet via secure SFTP connection. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This exports pending travel requests to SuccessFactors EC Time Sheet via SFTP. SAP Concur natively manages travel requests, and the integration with Employee Central for time recording can be configured through standard connectors. BTP extension may be needed for the specific CSV formatting and SFTP delivery logic.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_I001_TIME_UPDATEBiometric Time Event Upload \u2013 Employee Clock-In/Out Integration — A custom SAP HR integration program that reads employee clock-in and clock-out events from an external biometric access-control system and uploads them as formal Time Events (Infotype 2011) into SAP Time Management for payroll and attendance processing. SAP BTP (Standard API) + SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This integrates biometric clock-in/out events into HR Time Management. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking provides standard APIs for ingesting external time events. SAP BTP connects the external biometric system to SF Time Tracking using the standard Time Events API, handling data mapping and scheduling. The API is standard; the integration flow configuration is needed.
HR (Custom) ZHQAPPWTRSaudi Arabia Payroll Wage Type Reporter — A custom SAP HR payroll report for Saudi Arabia that presents detailed wage type breakdowns per employee for a selected payroll period, with an optional period-to-period comparison mode to highlight payroll variances. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports detailed payroll wage type breakdowns per employee with period comparison. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll provides payroll results reporting and wage type analysis. The Saudi-specific formatting, period comparison mode, and variance highlighting may require BTP extension for advanced custom report layouts.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CAR_MASTERFleet Vehicle Master Data Maintenance — A bilingual English and Arabic SAP dialog transaction for creating, searching, updating, and deleting company fleet vehicle master records in a central car master table (ZHR_CAR_MASTER). SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition + SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central or a BTP extension app (SAP Build Apps).Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) If vehicles are accounted as fixed assets, model them as Asset/Equipment master records in S/4HANA Cloud. If purely an HR-fleet register, model the data as a custom MDF object in EC or as a BTP extension (SAP Build Apps + HANA Cloud) — Arabic/English UI labels are handled by standard translation, not custom dialog screens.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CAR_MASTER_DATAHR Company Car Master Data Report — An interactive ALV report consolidating employee master data with company car assignments, supporting bilingual English and Arabic output for HR and fleet management. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics or SAP BDC (cross-source story over Employee Central )Fully Available as part of the Standard Replace the ABAP ALV with a People Analytics report or SAP Analytics Cloud story that joins Employee Central data with the fleet custom MDF (or S/4HANA Equipment master). Bilingual output is achieved through SAC translations / EC localization. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CAR_MASTER_DATA_UPDATEHR Fleet Management - Car Master Data Overview and Maintenance — An interactive HR fleet management report that displays company vehicle master data in a colour-coded ALV grid, with direct navigation to vehicle create and update transactions. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BTP + SAP BDCPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace the colour-coded ALV-grid + transaction jump with a Build Apps screen (or a Fiori Elements list-report extension) that calls the standard create/update APIs. Conditional formatting is configured declaratively — no GUI coding.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BUDGET_TRANSACTIONHR Budget Transaction Menu Launcher — A navigational entry point that opens a pre-configured SAP menu-tree browser consolidating all HR budget-related reports and transactions under a single access point. SAP Fiori Launchpad (Spaces, Pages and Tiles) on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire the program and migrate its menu structure to the Fiori Launchpad as a Space/Page with themed Tiles. Map each AREA_MENU entry to a corresponding Fiori app tile or custom navigation tile.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BENEFITS_TRANSACTIONHR Benefits Dashboard Launcher — A program that opens a pre-configured hierarchical navigation menu for the HR Benefits module, providing a single entry point to all Benefits-related transactions and reports. SAP Fiori Launchpad (Spaces, Pages and Tiles) on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire and replace with Fiori Launchpad configuration. Create a dedicated Benefits Launchpad Space with Pages for different Benefits sub-processes.
HR (Custom) ZHR_COMMITMENT_TRANSACTIONHR Commitment Transaction Menu Launcher — A dedicated SAP entry-point transaction that presents users with a structured, hierarchical navigation menu for all HR Commitment-related activities. SAP Fiori Launchpad (Spaces, Pages and Tiles) on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire and replace with Fiori Launchpad configuration. Create a dedicated Commitment Launchpad Space with grouped Fiori tiles for each sub-process.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BUSCARD_STATUSEmployee Business Card Request Status Report — An HR operational report that displays the processing status of employee business card requests, including bilingual employee details and requested card items, presented in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BTP + SAP BDCPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Re-platform the business-card request itself as a Build Process Automation flow with a SuccessFactors-driven approver chain; expose the status list as a Build Apps tile or a SAP Analytics Cloud story. The ABAP ALV becomes obsolete.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CH_IN_OUT_REPORTEmployee Daily Check-In and Check-Out Attendance Report — An HR report displaying daily employee check-in and check-out times alongside Hijri and Gregorian absence dates, division, job title, grade, and supervisor information from biometric gate data. SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingFully Available as part of the Standard This reports daily employee check-in and check-out times with overtime calculations. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking natively captures clock-in/out events, calculates worked hours, and identifies overtime. Standard reporting within Time Tracking and People Analytics provides equivalent functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_DEL_DUPL_2002Deletion of Duplicate Attendance Records (Infotype 2002) — An HR administrative utility to identify and permanently remove duplicate Attendance Infotype 2002 records from SAP HCM, ensuring data integrity for time evaluation and payroll processing. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This identifies and removes duplicate attendance records from IT2002. This is a data quality utility that should not be needed in SuccessFactors Time Tracking as the system prevents duplicate entries through validation rules. If data quality issues arise during migration, they should be resolved as part of the cutover project, not as ongoing functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_DELMT_3017Mass Delimitation of Recurring Payments and Deductions (Infotype 14) — An HR batch report that end-dates a selected subtype of recurring payroll deductions or payments for a range of employees up to a specified date, with coordinated handling of related leave quota infotypes and a full ALV processing log. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This end-dates recurring payments and deductions in batch. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll manages recurring payments/deductions with effective-dating. Mass delimitation (end-dating) operations may require BTP extension for bulk processing capabilities beyond standard EC Payroll admin tools, particularly for complex scenarios involving multiple payment subtypes.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_ATTENDANCEEmployee Attendance Summary Report — A Human Resources report that consolidates daily workforce attendance across office presence, remote work, business trips, and leave absences for a selected date range into a unified daily dashboard. SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingFully Available as part of the Standard This consolidates daily workforce attendance across office, remote, and fieldwork categories. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking captures all attendance types and provides summary views. Standard Time Tracking reports and dashboards provide equivalent workforce attendance visibility without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMERGENCY_REPEmergency Team Attendance Report — An HR report displaying real-time attendance and availability status for designated emergency team members, including floor assignment, contact details, leave status, and time clock events for a selected date. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + SuccessFactors Time Tracking / Time Off +SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics or SAP BDCFully Available as part of the Standard Build the emergency-team dashboard as a People Analytics report (or SAC story) sourcing real-time data from EC, Time Tracking and Time Off via standard APIs. Floor/seat assignment can be a custom MDF in EC if not already modelled. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_DELAY_FOR_WORKEmployee Lateness Monitoring and Excuse Classification Report — A monthly HR report that identifies employee late arrivals, classifies each instance by approval status into four categories, and provides management with an organized summary for performance follow-up and disciplinary action. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This identifies employee late arrivals and classifies excuses. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking captures clock-in events and can flag deviations from scheduled start times. People Analytics can build reports showing lateness patterns, excuse classifications, and trends. Time evaluation rules handle the lateness threshold logic natively.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELEVENMONTH_COMPL_MAIL11-Month Service Completion Automated HR Notification — A scheduled batch report that identifies employees completing exactly 11 months of active service and sends an HTML-formatted email notification to the HR team, supporting timely employment decisions before probationary period ends. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends automated notifications when employees complete 11 months of service. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services supports scheduled rule-based alerts that can calculate service tenure and trigger notifications at configurable milestones. This is standard EC notification functionality requiring only business rule configuration.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_COMM_FIXEmployee Communication Record Duplicate Fix — An HR data-fix utility that identifies and permanently deletes duplicate Infotype 0105 Personal Communication records from SAP HCM, retaining only the most recent active record per employee and subtype, with test-run mode. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This deletes duplicate communication records from infotype 0105. Marked as 'No Need' — SuccessFactors Employee Central manages communication data (email, phone) with built-in validation preventing duplicates. This data-fix utility is not required in the new system as EC enforces data integrity natively.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_COVID_STATSEmployee COVID-19 Vaccination and Infection Statistics Report — An HR report that consolidates and displays COVID-19 vaccination and infection statistics by department, with drill-down to individual employee records and linked vaccine certificate documents. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BDCFully Available as part of the Standard Retire immediately. No ongoing business value - COVID-19 vaccination tracking is a time-limited operational need. Archive data from ZHR_COVID_DET, ZHR_COVID_PDF, and related custom tables per data retention policy.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_COVID_STATS_APPREJCOVID-19 Vaccination Stats Dashboard and Approval Workflow — An HR report tracking COVID-19 vaccination immunization statistics by organizational unit with an interactive approval workflow for supervisors to review, accept, or reject vaccination documentation submissions with email notification. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BDCFully Available as part of the Standard Retire immediately. COVID-19 vaccination tracking is operationally obsolete. Archive ZHR_COVID_DET data per the organisation's data retention policy for compliance audit purposes.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_APP_HISTORYEmployee Appraisal History and Promotion Details Report — An HR report consolidating employee appraisal ratings for the current and prior two fiscal years alongside last promotion dates, drawn from both live SAP HR and a connected legacy HR database, displayed in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This consolidates appraisal ratings across periods with promotion details. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals stores appraisal history natively with multi-period visibility. People Analytics enables cross-period comparison reports combining performance ratings with career progression data. This is fully available as standard reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_APP_HISTORY_NEWEmployee Appraisal History and Promotion Report (v2) — A report consolidating employee appraisal ratings and promotion history across three fiscal years, merging current SAP HR performance data with pre-2018 legacy system records for HR review and talent management. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + SuccessFactors Employee Central + SAP BDC or SuccessFactors People Analytics ; SAP Datasphere if legacy pre-2018 data must be merged.Fully Available as part of the Standard Current ratings and promotions live in SuccessFactors. Merge with pre-2018 legacy data only through SAP Datasphere (or BTP HANA Cloud) as a side-by-side reporting layer; do not extend the SuccessFactors core with legacy tables. Final consumption via SAC or People Analytics. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELIGIBILITY_REPORTEmployee Promotion Eligibility Report for Bahrain HR — A custom HR report that evaluates employee promotion eligibility by calculating whether each employee qualifies for normal, exceptional, or delegation-based exceptional promotion based on service time, performance ratings, and disciplinary records. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This evaluates promotion eligibility based on tenure, grade, and performance. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals tracks employee performance ratings, and People Analytics can build eligibility reports combining tenure, grade, and appraisal data. BTP extension may be needed for Bahrain-specific eligibility calculation rules that go beyond standard reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_DET_LEGACY_UPDEmployee Master Data Synchronization to Legacy System — A custom HR report that collects comprehensive employee master data from SAP HR infotypes and synchronizes it to a legacy system, tracking processing status in a custom database table with bilingual and photo handling. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes comprehensive employee master data to a legacy system. SAP BTP is required to build an integration flow extracting employee data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via OData APIs and loading it into the legacy database. Custom iFlow development is needed as the legacy target has no standard connector.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_DET_LEGACY_DELEmployee Data Sync Between SAP HR and Legacy SQL DB (Full Refresh) — A background report that fully refreshes employee master data between SAP HR and an external legacy SQL database by clearing and reloading both the legacy table and the SAP-side staging table on every execution. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This fully refreshes employee master data in a legacy SQL database. Marked as 'No Need' — the legacy system integration will not be carried forward. If future integration is required, SAP BTP can extract data from SuccessFactors Employee Central APIs for any downstream system.
HR (Custom) ZHR_BG_UPD_SFIOM_KMAP_OSIHR Background Update of SuccessFactors Integration Key-Mapping Z3 — A batch HR program that reads SuccessFactors Integration key-mapping records by OSI type code, populates the missing Z3 identifier field, and inserts the corrected records back into the mapping table to maintain SAP-SuccessFactors integration integrity. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This updates SuccessFactors Integration key-mapping tables in batch. SAP BTP handles data synchronization between SuccessFactors and other systems using standard APIs. The specific key-mapping update logic for SFIOM/KMAP tables requires custom iFlow development in BTP as it is a proprietary integration pattern.
HR (Custom) ZHR_COMMIT_SAL_REPORTEmployee Salary Commitment and Transfer Request Status Report — A custom SAP HR report providing a consolidated view of employee salary commitment and salary transfer requests, including multi-level approval status and approver decisions at each authorisation stage. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports employee salary commitments and transfer request status. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll holds salary data, and People Analytics can build consolidated salary reports. BTP extension may be needed for the specific salary transfer request workflow logic and advanced localized formatting not available in standard reports.
HR (Custom) ZHR_COMMIT_SAL_POSTSalary Commitment Bank Detail Posting Automation — A program that reads approved employee salary commitment orders and automatically posts the corresponding bank detail changes into SAP HR master data Infotype 0009, with test mode preview and status writeback. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — Payment Information (bank-detail self-service / mass change) replicated to SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll; orchestration via SAP Build Process Automation if approvals are required.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Bank-detail updates (legacy IT0009) are maintained in EC Payment Information and replicated to ECP via the standard EC→ECP integration. Test-mode preview and approval flow are covered by EC workflows / Build Process Automation — the custom posting program is obsolete.
HR (Custom) ZHR_COURSE_DETAILSCourse and Participant Details Report — An SAP HR report that lists LSO training events and enrolled participants within a date range, enriched with employee master data, organizational hierarchy, invoice status, and workflow approval tracking. SAP SuccessFactors LearningFully Available as part of the Standard This lists training events and enrolled participants within a date range. SAP SuccessFactors Learning natively provides course catalogs, participant tracking, enrollment management, and training reports. People Analytics enables cross-module reporting combining learning data with employee demographics. This is standard functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CC_COURT_RULING_ASIDF_NOTFAutomated Court Ruling Date Email Notification — An automated background report in the HR Legal Department that detects court cases where a ruling has been issued against SIDF and sends bilingual Arabic and English email notifications to responsible case officers on a recurring five-day cycle. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This sends automated email notifications when court ruling dates approach. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services supports date-based alert rules that can trigger notifications based on custom date fields. The notification is standard; however, the specific court ruling date tracking and ASIDF-specific logic may need minor configuration or extension for the particular business rule.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CC_NOTICE_PERIOD_NOTIFCourt Case Notice Period Automated Email Notification — A background report that monitors court case notice periods and sends bilingual HTML email alerts to responsible employees at the 25-day and 30-day milestones, ensuring timely legal action before notice period expiry. SAP Build Process Automation (scheduled monitoring + bilingual HTML email) with SAP Document Management Service for case documents; case data modelled as a custom MDF in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central or as a BTP extension app.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Legal case management is not a standard SuccessFactors object. Model court-case records as a custom MDF in EC (or as a BTP extension on HANA Cloud) and use SAP Build Process Automation to monitor the 25-day / 30-day milestones and send bilingual Arabic/English mails — keeps the core clean.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CC_HEARING_NOTIFCourt Hearing Notification Automation for Legal Department — A scheduled batch program that monitors court case records for upcoming hearing dates within 7 days or 1 day and automatically sends bilingual Arabic and English HTML email notifications to the responsible case officers. SAP Build Process Automation (scheduled trigger + bilingual notifications) over the court-case custom MDF; SAP Integration Suite for any external calendar/email integration.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Same pattern as the notice-period notifier: a scheduled Build Process Automation flow consumes the case MDF, detects 7-day / 1-day hearing windows and dispatches Arabic + English HTML mails. No ABAP batch program required.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CC_FINAL_NOTICE_NOTIFHR Legal Court Case Final Notice Expiry Notification — A scheduled batch program that detects court cases whose 15-day final notice period has expired and automatically dispatches bilingual Arabic and English HTML email notifications to the responsible case officers. SAP Build Process Automation (scheduled flow + email task) sourcing the court-case custom MDF in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central / BTP extension.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Consolidate the three court-case notifiers (notice period, hearing, final notice) into a single Build Process Automation project with multiple scheduled triggers — easier governance, no custom ABAP, bilingual templates via Document Generation.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_INFOSAP HR to Eltezam Employee Basic Information Submission — An SAP HR report that collects active employee basic master data from HR infotypes and transmits it to the Saudi Arabian government Eltezam compliance platform via a SOAP web service, supporting both interactive and automated delta synchronization modes. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This submits employee basic information to the Saudi Eltezam government portal. SAP BTP extracts employee data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via OData APIs and submits it in the format required by Eltezam. No pre-built standard integration exists for this Saudi government system — custom iFlow development is required.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_JOB_INFOSAP HR to Eltezam Employee Job Information Submission — An SAP HR report that collects active employee job information, translates SAP codes to Eltezam-compatible codes via custom mapping tables, and transmits selected employee records to the Saudi government Eltezam workforce compliance system via an outbound web service proxy. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This submits employee job information to the Saudi Eltezam portal. SAP BTP extracts job data (position, grade, department) from SuccessFactors Employee Central and submits to Eltezam. Like other Eltezam integrations, this requires custom iFlow development as no standard connector exists for the Eltezam government system.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_HIST_INFOSAP HR Employee Historical Information Transmission to Eltezam — An SAP HR report that collects employee master data from HR infotypes and transmits it to the Saudi Arabian government Eltezam compliance platform via a SOAP web service, supporting both interactive and automated delta synchronization with Hijri date conversion. SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration) — outbound iFlow to the Eltezam SOAP endpoint, sourcing data from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central via standard OData APIs.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Replace the on-prem SOAP report with an SAP Integration Suite iFlow that pulls employee history from Employee Central via OData and posts to the Eltezam SOAP service. Use SAP Integration Suite's WS-Security adapter for the government certificate and the Message Mapping editor for any field transformations.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_PAY_INFOEmployee Payslip Reporting to Saudi Eltezam Government Portal — An SAP HR program that collects employee payslip data and transmits it to the Saudi Arabian government Eltezam compliance portal via a web service, with interactive ALV preview and full transmission logging. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This submits employee payslip data to the Saudi Eltezam government portal. SAP BTP extracts payroll results from SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll and transforms them into the Eltezam submission format. Custom integration development is required as there is no pre-built Eltezam payroll connector.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_QALF_INFOEmployee Academic Qualification Transmission to Eltezam — An SAP HR report that collects employee academic qualification data and transmits it to the external government compliance system Eltezam via web service, with interactive review and a full audit log of every transmission attempt. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This transmits employee academic qualifications to Eltezam. SAP BTP extracts qualification data from SuccessFactors Employee Central (Background Elements) and submits to the Eltezam portal. Custom BTP integration development is required for the specific Eltezam API format and submission protocol.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_VACATION_INFOEmployee Vacation Information Transmission to Eltezam — An SAP HR report that extracts employee vacation and leave data, converts dates to Hijri calendar format, and transmits the records to the external Eltezam government regulatory system via web service, with ALV review and full audit logging. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This transmits employee vacation/leave data to the Eltezam portal. SAP BTP extracts time off data from SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off module and submits to Eltezam. Full BTP rebuild required as there is no standard integration content for transmitting leave data to Saudi government portals.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ELTEZAM_EMP_APPRAISAL_INFOEmployee Appraisal Information Submission to Eltezam Government Portal — An HR report that uploads employee appraisal data from Excel, displays it in an interactive ALV grid for review, and transmits approved records to the Saudi Arabian Eltezam government compliance system via an outbound web service. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This uploads appraisal data to the Eltezam government portal. SAP BTP is required to extract appraisal data from SuccessFactors Performance & Goals via API and transform/submit it to the Saudi Eltezam portal. This is a custom government integration with no pre-built connector — full BTP rebuild is needed for the integration flow.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_GOSI_GROUP_REPORTEmployee GOSI Group Report — An SAP HCM report that displays each active employee's GOSI (General Organization for Social Insurance) grouping alongside key employee master data attributes in an interactive ALV grid, supporting Saudi Arabian regulatory compliance. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll — Saudi Arabia localization (GOSI grouping & reporting) + SuccessFactors People Analytics / SAP Analytics Cloud for the ALV-equivalent display.Fully Available as part of the Standard GOSI grouping is delivered by ECP Saudi localization. Replace the custom ALV with a SuccessFactors People Analytics report or an SAC story consuming the standard ECP/EC data — no Z-report needed. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LSO_TRAINHR Learning Solution Training Participant List Selection Report — A custom selection screen front-end for the SAP LSO Participant List report, enabling training administrators to filter and select training objects by type and delivery method before submitting to the standard SAP participant list engine. SAP SuccessFactors Learning + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays training participant lists with selection options. SAP SuccessFactors Learning provides native participant list management, course roster views, enrollment tracking, and participation reports. People Analytics enables cross-referencing training data with employee demographics. This is standard LMS functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LMS_ACADEMY_DATA_DELETESIDF Academy LMS Participant Data Deletion Utility — A data housekeeping report that allows HR administrators to permanently delete SIDF Academy LMS participant records from a custom SAP staging table based on a user-specified creation date range. SAP SuccessFactors Learning — standard data retention / housekeeping jobs; SAP Integration Suite for any pre-purge custom staging.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) In SuccessFactors Learning, retention policies and the standard Data Retention Time Management (DRTM) framework cover record purges. If a staging table is still required (e.g. for legacy SIDF Academy data), maintain it in BTP HANA Cloud and schedule the purge via SAP Build Process Automation rather than ABAP.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LMS_INV_UPDSAP SuccessFactors LMS to HR Attendance Integration Report — A program that automatically creates HR Attendance (Infotype 2002) records in SAP HR based on confirmed training enrollments loaded from the SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System via a custom staging table. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors Learning APIsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This creates attendance records from SuccessFactors LMS enrollment completions. SAP BTP is needed to listen for training completion events from SuccessFactors Learning and create corresponding attendance records in Time Tracking. BTP extension handles the specific business logic mapping training days to attendance entries.
HR (Custom) ZHR_INSRT_FLT_TCKT_COSTFlight Ticket Number and Cost Entry for Employee Travel Trips — An interactive HR report enabling users to record flight ticket numbers, costs, receipt attachments, and travel route details against approved employee travel trip requests in an editable ALV grid. SAP Concur Travel & ExpensePartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This records flight ticket numbers and costs against employee travel trips. SAP Concur Travel & Expense natively supports flight booking, ticket capture, and cost entry as core expense management functionality. BTP extension may be needed for the specific interactive form interface or integration with a local Saudi travel agency booking system.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MASTER_DATAEmployee Master Data Report with Multilingual ALV Display — A centralized HR report that extracts and displays comprehensive employee master data including personal, organizational, demographic, and contact information in a filterable ALV grid with English and Arabic language support. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (standard Employee Master Data exports / Person Profile) + SuccessFactors People Analytics or SAP Analytics Cloud for the multilingual report layout.Fully Available as part of the Standard Employee master data lives in EC. Replace the ALV with a People Analytics report (or SAC story) using EC's standard data model — English/Arabic labels are delivered by EC translations. The Z-report becomes obsolete. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MASTERDATA_UPLOADHR Employee Master Data Mass Upload via BDC — A BDC-based upload tool that reads employee master data from an Excel spreadsheet and mass-creates or re-hires employees in SAP HR by automating the Personnel Actions transaction (PA40) screen-by-screen. SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralFully Available as part of the Standard This mass-uploads employee master data from Excel via BDC. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central provides native data import capabilities including CSV/Excel import, Import and Export Data tool, and OData API for bulk employee data loading. No custom development is needed — this is standard EC administration functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MASTER_DATA_MURSALATEmployee Master Data Report for Murasalat Synchronization — A comprehensive HR report that extracts employee master data enriched with bilingual names, organizational hierarchy, national ID, cost centre, and contact details, formatted specifically for transmission to the Murasalat correspondence management system. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This extracts employee master data for Murasalat system synchronization. SAP BTP is required to extract enriched employee data from SuccessFactors Employee Central and push it to the Murasalat correspondence management system. Full BTP rebuild is needed as Murasalat has no standard SAP integration connector.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MURASALAT_NEWMurasalat HR Employee Hire and Termination Synchronisation — A daily HR report that detects employee hiring and termination events in SAP HR, assembles comprehensive employee profiles in bilingual format, and synchronizes them to the external Murasalat correspondence management system via a dedicated integration class. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This detects hire/termination events and syncs them to Murasalat. SAP BTP is required to subscribe to employee lifecycle events from SuccessFactors Employee Central and push them to the Murasalat system. Full BTP rebuild is needed as there is no standard integration content for the Murasalat target system.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MURASALAT_UPDATEMurasalat HR Change Events Synchronisation — A daily HR report that detects employee department transfers, organizational structure changes, employee profile updates, and manager assignment changes in SAP HR and synchronizes them to the Murasalat external system via a dedicated integration class with robust error retry logic. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This detects employee department transfers and org changes and syncs to Murasalat. SAP BTP subscribes to organizational assignment change events from SuccessFactors Employee Central and forwards them to Murasalat. Full BTP rebuild is needed for this customer-specific government system integration.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MURASALAT_ORGOrganizational Hierarchy Synchronization to Murasalat — An HCM report that extracts the complete SAP organizational hierarchy, enriches it with bilingual names and ownership data, and synchronizes it to the external Murasalat correspondence management system database via native SQL. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes the organizational hierarchy to Murasalat. SAP BTP extracts the full org hierarchy from SuccessFactors Employee Central and transforms it for Murasalat consumption. Full BTP rebuild is needed because the Murasalat system requires a specific data format with no pre-built connector available.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MURABH_UPDATEMurabah Benefit Entitlement Calculation and HR Master Data Update — A program that calculates Islamic finance (Murabah) benefit entitlements for employees based on Hijri calendar service length and payroll history, then writes the computed recurring payment records directly into SAP HR Infotype 14. Side-by-side extension on SAP BTP (SAP Build Apps + Business Rules / HANA Cloud) for the Murabah calculation, writing the result back to SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central / Employee Central Payroll recurring-payment elements via standard APIs.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Islamic-finance (Hijri-calendar) entitlement logic is not standard in EC/ECP. Build it as a BTP extension: data sourced from EC + ECP via OData, calculation in HANA Cloud or Business Rules, results written back as recurring pay components — preserving clean core.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_APPRAISAL_RTGEmployee PMS Appraisal Rating Report — A report that retrieves, calculates, and displays employee Performance Management System appraisal ratings including standard line-manager and 360-degree peer-feedback scores with custom weighting in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This retrieves and displays PMS appraisal ratings with calculated scores. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals stores all appraisal data with rating calculations. People Analytics provides reporting on performance distributions, rating breakdowns, and trend analysis. This is fully available as standard PMS reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_EMP_APPRAISAL_NDBEmployee PMS Appraisal Rating Upload and Display — An HR report that uploads employee Performance Management System appraisal ratings from a local Excel file into a custom SAP database table and displays the results in an interactive grid for review, with authorization control and test-run mode. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals (rating capture and history); SuccessFactors Import / Integration Center for any one-time bulk upload from spreadsheets.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Annual PMS ratings are captured directly in SuccessFactors Performance & Goals; bulk Excel loads use the standard SuccessFactors Import / Integration Center. Retire the custom Z-table and grid display in favour of standard SF reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_360STATUS_REPORT360-Degree Performance Appraisal Status Report — An HR report that displays the real-time completion status of 360-degree appraisal documents, showing appraisees, their assigned appraisers, and the overall document lifecycle stage in an interactive ALV grid with saveable layouts. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays 360-degree appraisal completion status. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals natively supports 360-degree feedback with real-time status tracking and completion dashboards. People Analytics enables custom status reports across the organization. This is standard Performance & Goals functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ESIGNTURE_DELEGATIONHR E-Signature Delegation Management Report — An HR e-signature delegation management report that reads active user substitution records from the SAP workflow system, enriches them with employee HR details for both delegator and delegate, synchronizes a custom e-signature delegation table, and displays the full delegation picture in an interactive on-screen list. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — standard Workflow Delegation; SAP Build Process Automation (My Inbox delegations) for any cross-system task delegation; SAP Signature Management by DocuSign for actual e-signatures.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Workflow substitution is delivered by SuccessFactors EC's standard delegation framework and by My Inbox delegations in SAP Build Process Automation. Combine with Signature Management by DocuSign for the e-signature step. The Z-report becomes redundant; reporting on delegations is done through SF People Analytics.
HR (Custom) ZHR_ESIGNTURE_LEAV_TRAVLE-Signature Staging for Leave and Travel Requests — An SAP HR report that extracts open leave and travel requests from HR infotypes, enriches every record with the employee full name and email address, refreshes a custom staging table with the enriched records, and presents the result set in a full-featured ALV grid for e-signature review. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + Docusign for E-signituresPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This stages leave and travel requests for e-signature processing. SAP Concur handles travel request approval, EC Time Off manages leave requests, and a third-party e-signature solution (e.g., DocuSign) provides digital signature capability. BTP extension is needed to orchestrate the e-signature workflow across multiple systems and document types.
HR (Custom) ZHR_GRC_ENTITY_ORGHR to GRC Organizational Hierarchy Synchronization — A program that extracts the complete SAP HR organizational hierarchy enriched with type classification, responsible owner, and parent-child relationships, and synchronizes it into an external GRC system via native SQL. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes the organizational hierarchy to SAP GRC. SAP BTP extracts the org structure from SuccessFactors Employee Central and transforms it into the GRC-required format. Full BTP rebuild is needed because the GRC org hierarchy ingestion requires specific data transformations and the integration has no pre-built content.
HR (Custom) ZHR_GRC_EMP_INFOHR to GRC Employee Information Synchronisation — A program that extracts active employee data from SAP HCM and synchronises it to an external Governance, Risk and Compliance system, keeping user rosters, job titles, reporting lines, and department assignments current via native SQL. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes active employee data to SAP GRC. SAP BTP is required to extract employee information from SuccessFactors Employee Central and feed it to SAP GRC for access control and risk analysis. Custom integration development is needed as there is no standard SuccessFactors-to-GRC employee data connector.
HR (Custom) ZHR_GRC_DELEGATIONHR to GRC Delegation Data Synchronization — A program that extracts active HR workflow delegation and substitution records from SAP and synchronizes the delegation assignments to an external GRC system to keep access control and approval delegation current. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes HR workflow delegation and substitution records to SAP GRC. SAP BTP is required to extract delegation data from SuccessFactors Employee Central and push it to the GRC system. No standard pre-built integration content exists for SuccessFactors-to-GRC delegation synchronization — custom iFlow development is needed.
HR (Custom) ZHR_HIRING_QUOTAAutomated Leave Quota Provisioning for New Hires — An SAP HCM report that automatically creates leave entitlement and quota compensation records for newly hired employees on their hiring date, applying country-specific prorated leave day calculations based on employee group. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This automatically provisions leave quotas for newly hired employees. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off supports automatic leave accrual and quota provisioning triggered by hire events through Time Off business rules. BTP extension may be needed for complex Saudi-specific quota calculation rules (e.g., pro-rating based on Hijri calendar, special entitlements by grade/nationality).
HR (Custom) ZHR_HIRING_TRAVEL_PRIVAutomated Assignment of Travel Privileges and Leave Entitlements for Newly Hired Employees — A batch HCM report that automatically creates Travel Privilege, Absence Quota, and Quota Correction records for newly hired employees of eligible employee groups based on a specified hiring action date. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This automatically assigns travel privileges and leave entitlements to new hires. SAP Concur handles travel policy assignment based on employee attributes, and EC manages leave entitlements. BTP extension may be needed to orchestrate the automated assignment across both systems triggered by the hiring event in Employee Central.
HR (Custom) ZHR_HIRING_UPDATE_TO_LEGACYEmployee Hire Data Push to Legacy HR System — A daily HR report that detects new employee hiring events in SAP HR and pushes the complete employee hire data including personal details, organizational assignment, and contact information to a connected legacy HR system for record synchronization. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This pushes new hire data to a legacy HR system. SAP BTP is required to detect hire events from SuccessFactors Employee Central (via Intelligent Services or event-driven integration) and push the employee record to the legacy system. Full BTP rebuild is needed as the legacy system has no standard connector.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMPL_DET_COR_SYS_UPDEmployee Hire and Termination Sync with Correspondence Management System — A daily HR report that detects employee hiring and termination events in SAP and synchronises the employee profile data into an external correspondence management system automatically, ensuring real-time alignment of employee records. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This syncs employee hire and termination events to a correspondence management system. SAP BTP is required to detect hire/termination events in SuccessFactors Employee Central (via Intelligent Services events or scheduled delta extraction) and push them to the external correspondence system. No standard connector exists for this target system.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LEAVERS_REPORTEmployee Leavers Report — An SAP HCM report that identifies and displays employees who have left the organization within a specified date range, providing comprehensive exit details including termination reason, last working day, department, grade, and HR administrative data for offboarding and statutory compliance purposes. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This identifies and displays employees who left the organization within a period. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central stores all employee lifecycle data including termination events. People Analytics provides standard turnover reports, leaver analysis, and attrition dashboards. This is fully available as standard reporting functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMPLOYEE_LAST_6_MONTHSEmployee Workforce Activity Tracker - Last 6 Months (Saudization Compliance) — An SAP HCM report that identifies employees who were newly hired, reclassified from trainee to Saudi national, or completed their probation period within the last six months, supporting Saudization (Nitaqat) compliance monitoring. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This tracks employee workforce activity over the last 6 months for Saudization compliance. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics provides workforce composition analysis by nationality, hire/termination trends, and headcount reports — all core capabilities for Saudization/Nitaqat compliance monitoring. However, full BTP rebuild is indicated because the specific custom logic and government submission format require tailored development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMPLOYEE_BIRTHDATE_WISHESAutomated Employee Birthday Greetings Notification — A scheduled batch HR report that identifies employees with birthdays on the current day and automatically sends personalized HTML birthday greeting email notifications to each qualifying employee via the SAP messaging system. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends automated birthday greeting emails to employees. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services supports date-based alert rules that can trigger birthday notifications using employee date-of-birth data. HTML email templates with personalized content can be configured as standard EC alerts without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_MAIL_NOTIFICATIONHR Automated Mail Notification for Employee Lifecycle Events — A scheduled background report that sends automated HTML email alerts to employees and the HR team about upcoming passport and document expiry, contract expiry, retirement, and end of probation dates within a 90-day look-ahead window. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends automated HTML email alerts for employee lifecycle events. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services provides configurable event-based email notifications for all HR events (hire, transfer, termination, promotion, etc.). Standard HTML email templates support bilingual content. Advanced formatting or complex conditional logic may require minor BTP extension.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LONG_LT_NOTIFICATIONMail Notification for Long Leave and Travel — A scheduled HR batch report that identifies employees of eligible subgroups on long leave or travel of 5 or more calendar days within a 7-day lookback window and sends automated HTML email notifications to security and HR administrators, with deduplication to prevent repeat alerts. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off + Intelligent Services / Alerts)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends email notifications for employees on long leave or travel. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off tracks leave balances and durations, and Intelligent Services can trigger alerts based on leave duration thresholds. Standard EC alert rules can notify managers when employees exceed configurable leave period limits without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_OVERTIME_LOGOvertime Request Tracking and Audit Log — An HR report that retrieves and displays overtime request records from a custom audit log table, providing HR and payroll administrators with a consolidated, filterable view of all overtime requests, their approval status, processing history, and payment outcomes. SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This retrieves and displays overtime request records from a custom audit log. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking manages overtime requests and approvals natively. BTP extension may be needed for the specific custom audit trail reporting and localized formatting not covered by standard Time Tracking overtime reports.
HR (Custom) ZHR_OVERTIME_PAYMENTOvertime Payment Processing and Infotype 2010 Update — An interactive HR ALV report that reconciles approved overtime requests with actual time-evaluation results and posts remuneration records to SAP HR Infotype 2010 (Employee Remuneration) for payroll processing. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reconciles approved overtime with payroll postings. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll processes overtime payments based on approved time data from Time Tracking. BTP extension may be needed for the specific reconciliation workflow between overtime approval records and payroll wage type posting that matches the current custom logic.
HR (Custom) ZHR_OVERTIME_PAYMENT_SFOvertime Payment Processing (SuccessFactors) — An enhanced overtime payment processing program that reconciles SuccessFactors time management data with payroll and posts remuneration records, specifically designed for the SuccessFactors-integrated payroll environment with custom audit log and formal payment document output. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This processes overtime payments from SuccessFactors approval data. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll natively integrates with Time Tracking to process overtime payments. BTP extension may be needed for custom reconciliation logic between SuccessFactors overtime approvals and payroll posting, particularly for the Saudi-specific overtime calculation rules.
HR (Custom) ZHR_OFF_BANK_FILE_DOWNLOADSaudi Arabia Payroll Bank Transfer File Generation (Offline) — An SAP HR report that generates a fixed-format salary bank transfer file for Saudi Arabian banks from payroll results and downloads it to the user local PC, automating the electronic salary disbursement instruction process. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + SAP BTP (for bank file formatting)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This generates a fixed-format salary bank transfer file for offline processing. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll generates payment files, and SAP BTP can transform them into the specific Saudi bank format. The combination is partially available — core payroll payment generation exists, but the specific offline fixed-format file for Saudi banks requires BTP transformation logic.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_HOME_LOAN_DETAILSEmployee Home Loan Details Report — A read-only HR report that displays employee home loan details including loan amounts, outstanding balances, monthly deduction schedules, guarantor information, and loan status from a custom loan tracking table, enriched with employee master data. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — Advances & Deductions (and/or recurring payments) for the loan schedule; SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics for the read-only display.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Loan amounts, outstanding balances, monthly deductions and guarantor info can be modelled with EC Advances & Deductions plus a custom MDF for guarantor data. Replace the read-only ABAP report with a People Analytics report on top of the standard objects.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_QUES_REPORTEmployee COVID-19 Health Questionnaire Report — A report that retrieves and displays employee responses to a COVID-19 health self-declaration questionnaire from a custom SAP table, enabling HR and management to monitor workforce health risk exposure with filters for at-risk employees and complete history. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics + Employee CentralFully Available as part of the Standard This reports employee COVID-19 health questionnaire responses. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central supports custom MDF objects for storing questionnaire data, and People Analytics can build reports on the responses. This is fully available using EC custom objects for data capture and PA for reporting and analysis.
HR (Custom) ZHR_LEAVE_TYPE_CONFIGLeave Type Configuration Based on Gender — An HR configuration screen for validating and assigning gender-differentiated attendance and absence leave type codes within a defined personnel sub-area grouping, ensuring only legitimate and active codes are used in downstream HR processes. SAP SuccessFactors Time Off — Eligibility Rules and Business Rules for gender-/personnel-area-specific absence types.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Gender-differentiated leave validation is a standard SuccessFactors Time Off capability: configure eligibility rules and business rules to restrict absence types by gender and personnel area. The custom screen is obsolete.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PIN_POUTHR Employee Master Data and Time-Attendance Report (PIN/POUT) — A consolidated HR report combining employee biographical, organizational, and contract data with daily attendance metrics including check-in/check-out times, overtime hours, excused absences, and remote work figures in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This consolidates employee master data with time-attendance clock-in/out records. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking captures all clock events, and People Analytics can combine time data with employee biographical/organizational data in a single report. This is fully available as standard cross-module reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_ORG_STRUC_UPDEmployee Organization Structure Update — An HR batch report that synchronizes employee organizational assignment changes (department transfers, position updates, reporting line changes) detected in SAP HR to external downstream systems via a structured integration process with audit logging. SAP SuccessFactors People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This synchronizes employee organizational assignment changes to downstream systems. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics can produce equivalent org structure reports from Employee Central data. For the reporting aspect, standard People Analytics story reports can replicate this functionality. BTP extension is only needed if the exact legacy report format or batch-sync behavior must be preserved.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMP_IRFAN_AWARDSEmployee Irfan Award (Voluntary Early Separation) Report — A read-only HR report consolidating employee Irfan Award (Voluntary Early Separation) data including award amounts, GOSI details, financial entitlements, Hijri dates, and PDF attachment links for HR and finance review. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics + Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports on Irfan Award (voluntary early separation) data including eligibility and payout details. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics can report on separation data stored in Employee Central (termination reason, final settlement amounts). However, the full Irfan Award program logic (eligibility rules, custom award calculation, approval workflow) requires BTP extension as it is a customer-specific program not available in standard SF.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PROBATION_INITEmployee Probation Management Automation — A background program that identifies newly hired employees, creates probation evaluation records, assigns approval chains based on grade, and sends automated email and SMS notifications throughout the probation lifecycle. SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This automatically creates probation evaluation records for new hires. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central can trigger probation workflows via business rules upon hire events. BTP extension may be needed for the specific automated record creation, evaluation scheduling, and notification logic that replicates the full custom probation automation.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PROBATION_TRANSACTIONEmployee Probation Evaluation Transaction Launcher — A dedicated SAP entry-point transaction that routes HR users to the probation evaluation creation or update screen, providing a structured single-entry-point for all probation management activities. SAP SuccessFactors OnboardingFully Available as part of the Standard Retire and replace with Fiori Launchpad tile configuration. Create a dedicated Probation Management group in the Fiori Launchpad Space.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PROBATION_DELETEEmployee Probation Record Deletion Utility — An HR administrative utility that permanently deletes all probation evaluation records for specified employees from the custom probation management tables, providing a controlled, auditable deletion mechanism for erroneous or cancelled probation cases. SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This permanently deletes probation evaluation records. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central manages probation periods, but mass deletion of evaluation records may require BTP extension for bulk administrative operations. Standard EC admin tools support individual record management; mass deletion utilities may need custom tooling on BTP.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PROBATION_REPORTEmployee Probation Evaluation Report — An HR report that consolidates and displays employee probation evaluation records, including probation period dates, workflow status, approver information, ratings, and confirmation decisions for active employees matching user-defined selection criteria. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Workflows / Business Rules)Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This consolidates and displays probation evaluation records. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central supports probation management through Workflows and Business Rules, with configurable evaluation forms and approval chains. BTP extension may be needed for the specific multi-step evaluation report format and the custom scoring logic applied during probation reviews.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SICK_LEAVE_DEDUCTIONSSick Leave Salary Deduction Calculation and Posting — An HR payroll program that calculates tiered sick leave salary deductions for employees exceeding the tax-free threshold and automatically posts the resulting deduction records into SAP HR for the next payroll run, complying with Saudi Arabian labour law. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This calculates tiered sick leave salary deductions based on Saudi labor law. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll supports absence-based pay deduction rules. BTP extension may be needed for the specific Saudi labor law tiered deduction logic (e.g., progressive reduction after 30/60/90 days) if it exceeds standard payroll rule configuration capabilities.
HR (Custom) ZHR_UPDATE_PA0267HR Off-Cycle Payment Records Date Correction Utility — A one-time HR data correction program that updates validity-period dates on Additional Off-Cycle Payment records (Infotype 0267) for a targeted set of employees in SAP Payroll. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollFully Available as part of the Standard Retire immediately. This was a one-time data correction utility and has no ongoing operational value. Archive the source code and execution log for audit purposes.
HR (Custom) ZHR_UPDATE_DEDTO_2006Bulk Update of Absence Quota Deduction To Date (Infotype 2006) — A batch HR maintenance program that updates the Deduction To Date field on employee Absence Quota records for a selected group of employees, quota subtype, and calendar year, then displays the results in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Time Off — standard quota administration (mass update via Import / Integration Center).Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) In Time Off, absence-quota validity is configured at the quota object and can be mass-updated through the standard Time Off Import or Integration Center. IT2006 doesn't exist in the public-cloud HR stack; retire the custom batch program.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SALARY_COMPARISON_RPTSalary Benchmark vs. Actual Pay Comparison Report — An HR analytical report that compares employer-defined salary band benchmarks (minimum, maximum, midpoint) against actual employee pay scale amounts, grouped by grade and employee group, displayed in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Compensation (Pay Range / Compa-Ratio analysis) + SuccessFactors People Analytics or SAP Analytics Cloud for the grade/employee-group comparison view.Fully Available as part of the Standard Benchmark vs actual pay (min/max/midpoint, compa-ratio) is a native SuccessFactors Compensation capability. Build the grade × employee-group comparison as a People Analytics report or an SAC story; no ABAP Z-report required. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_QUOTA_92HR Absence Quota and Quota Correction Update for Hiring Action — A batch report that updates absence quota records (Infotype 2006, subtype 92) and inserts quota correction records (Infotype 2013) for employees associated with a custom hiring action type, displaying a full processing log upon completion. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This updates absence quota records for new hire actions. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off handles quota accrual rules triggered by hiring events. BTP extension may be needed for the specific quota correction logic (subtype 92) and complex recalculation scenarios that go beyond standard Time Off accrual rule configuration.
HR (Custom) ZHR_QUOTAHR Employee Annual Leave Quota Report — A report that retrieves and displays employee annual leave quota entitlements, utilisation, and remaining balances for Saudi, Non-Saudi, and Trainee workforce categories with language-switchable ALV grid output. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports annual leave quota entitlements, utilization, and remaining balances. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off manages leave quotas natively. People Analytics can report on quota data. BTP extension may be needed for Saudi-specific quota calculation rules (Hijri-based accruals, nationality-specific entitlements, or complex pro-rating logic).
HR (Custom) ZHR_QUOTA_NEWHR Leave Quota Balance Report for Saudi, Non-Saudi, and Trainee Employees — A custom HR report displaying annual leave quota entitlements, deductions, and remaining balances for Saudi, Non-Saudi, and Trainee employees, enriched with organizational hierarchy and employee master data in an interactive ALV grid. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Time Off) + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays leave quota balances segmented by Saudi, Non-Saudi, and Trainee categories. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off manages quotas by employee category, and People Analytics can build segmented reports by nationality/employment type. This is fully available using standard EC Time Off data and People Analytics reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TEVEN_UPDATEHR Time Events Synchronization from External Time Recording System — A daily scheduled HR background job that reads time events from a custom staging table populated by an external biometric time-recording system and synchronizes them into the SAP HR TEVEN time events table for time evaluation processing. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking APIsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This synchronizes time events from an external time recording system into HR. SAP BTP connects to the external time system and pushes events to SuccessFactors Time Tracking via standard APIs. BTP extension handles the scheduling, data mapping, and error handling for the daily synchronization job between the external clock system and SF Time Tracking.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TIME_SUMMARYEmployee Time and Attendance Summary Report — A consolidated HR time management report combining employee biographical, organizational, and work schedule data with daily attendance metrics including check-in/check-out times, planned hours, actual hours worked, deviations, and excuse notes for a selected date range. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This consolidates employee time and attendance data with organizational information. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking stores all time/attendance data, and People Analytics enables cross-module reporting combining time records with employee master data. This is fully available as standard Time Tracking + People Analytics reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_REPORT_DOWN_IN_OUT_TIMEEmployee Check-In/Check-Out Time and Attendance Deviation Report — An HR report that displays daily employee clock-in and clock-out times, planned shift schedules, actual worked hours, and deviations for a selected date range, with absence excuse integration and bilingual support. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking APIsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This downloads employee clock-in/out times and identifies attendance deviations. SAP BTP extracts time data from SuccessFactors Time Tracking via standard APIs for downstream consumption. BTP extension may be needed for the specific deviation calculation logic and the report formatting that combines time data with organizational hierarchy.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAVEL_UPDATEHR Travel Request Update and Attendance Posting — An HR program that processes approved employee travel requests from the SAP Travel Management module, creates corresponding HR Attendance (Infotype 2002) records for the trip period, and updates the travel request status in custom staging tables. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This processes approved travel requests and posts attendance records. SAP Concur manages travel approval workflows, and EC Time Tracking handles attendance. BTP extension is needed for the automation that creates attendance records from approved travel periods — bridging Concur travel dates with SuccessFactors time entries.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAVEL_DATE_UPDATETravel Request End Date Correction Utility — An HR utility that corrects the travel end date on existing travel request records by updating both the request header and line-item tables in SAP Travel Management for exceptional, out-of-process cases. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This corrects travel request end dates on existing records. SAP Concur Travel & Expense manages travel requests with full edit capabilities including date modifications. BTP extension may be needed for batch date correction scenarios or specific validation rules that mirror the current custom utility's logic.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAVEL_UPDATE_BACKGROUNDHR Travel Background Retry: Failed Attendance Record Processing — A background program that reprocesses previously failed employee business trip entries by creating SAP HR Attendance (Infotype 2002) records and logging the outcome back to a custom staging table. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reprocesses previously failed attendance record postings from travel data. SAP Concur + EC handles the primary workflow, but BTP extension is needed for the retry/error-handling logic that identifies failed records and re-attempts posting — replicating the background job error recovery pattern of the current custom program.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAVEL_REQUEST_CREATIONAutomated Travel Request Creation for SuccessFactors LMS Training Enrollments — A background HR automation program that scans SuccessFactors LMS enrollment records and automatically creates or updates SAP Travel Management requests including per diem calculations for employees scheduled to attend training events who have not submitted their own travel requests within the policy-defined grace period. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This auto-creates travel requests from SuccessFactors LMS training enrollments. SAP Concur handles travel request creation, and the automation linking LMS enrollment to travel request creation requires BTP extension to orchestrate the cross-system workflow between SuccessFactors Learning and SAP Concur via BTP.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAV_AGNT_FLT_TCKTTravel Agent Flight Ticket and Training Claims Launcher — A unified HR entry-point program that presents a two-option selection screen, routing users to either the flight ticket cost recording process or the training claims process. SAP ConcurFully Available as part of the Standard Retire immediately. Estimated migration effort: 2.5 days (XS). Map existing user roles from the ABAP program/T-code to Fiori catalog/role assignments.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAVEL_TRAINING_ATTACHMENTHR Training Enrollment and Travel Attachment Viewer — A report that consolidates SAP SuccessFactors LMS training enrollment records with supporting documents attached to employee travel reimbursement requests, enabling interactive download of certificates and invoices. SAP SuccessFactors Learning (training enrollments) + SAP Concur (travel reimbursement & attachments) + SAP Document Management Service for document download; SAP Build Apps for the consolidated viewer if needed.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Training enrollments are read from SF Learning APIs; reimbursement attachments are read from Concur via the Concur Receipts API (or DMS if stored centrally). Combine in a SAP Build Apps screen — or simply use the standard Concur and Learning UIs.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SV_2002_UPDATEMass Posting of Site-Visit Attendance Records to SAP HR (Infotype 2002) — A batch HR program that reads approved site-visit attendance requests from a custom staging table and posts them as official attendance records in SAP HR Infotype 2002, then displays a summary of successes and failures. SAP SuccessFactors Time TrackingPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This batch-posts approved site-visit attendance records to HR. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking manages attendance recording including field/site visits. BTP extension may be needed for the specific batch posting logic that reads from an external approval system and mass-creates time records via Time Tracking APIs.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SV_EXPENSE_POSTSite Visit Expense Approval Status and Payroll Posting — A custom HR report that displays employee site visit expense approval statuses and enables payroll administrators to post approved per diem allowances as off-cycle one-time payments (Infotype 0267) into the SAP HR payroll system. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This displays site visit expense approval status and posts to payroll. SAP Concur handles expense claims including site visit costs, and EC Payroll processes reimbursement payments. BTP extension may be needed for the specific approval status workflow and the payroll posting logic that bridges Concur expense approvals with EC Payroll off-cycle payments.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SCHALLOW_EXPENSE_POSTSchool/Education Allowance Payroll Posting — An HR program that posts approved employee school/education allowance requests as payroll payments (Infotype 0267) and updates the request tracking status accordingly, enabling final payroll execution of tuition reimbursement benefits. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll — One-Time Payments / Recurring Pay Components for the allowance; SAP Build Process Automation for the request + approval workflow.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) School/education allowance is a one-time or recurring pay component in ECP. Model the request and approval in Build Process Automation; on approval, write the payment via the ECP one-time-payment API. The custom posting program and request-status table are no longer required.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SCHALLOW_MASS_APPROVALSchool Allowance Mass Approval Processing — An HR workflow program that enables HR administrators to perform mass approval of pending school/education allowance requests on behalf of designated approvers, processing multiple requests simultaneously and updating approval status records. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Benefits) + Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This enables mass approval of school allowance benefit claims. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Benefits manages allowance entitlements, and EC Payroll processes the payments. The mass approval workflow may require configuration of EC business rules or minor BTP extension for the specific bulk processing interface needed by HR administrators.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRNG_CLAIMSHR Training and Travel Claims Processing — An HR interactive report that retrieves pending employee training and travel claim requests, enriches them with employee master data and GL account mapping rules, and enables HR administrators to select and submit claims for financial accounting document posting. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This processes pending training and travel claim requests. SAP Concur handles travel claims, and SuccessFactors Learning manages training-related costs.
