BTP extension is needed to provide the unified claim processing interface that combines both training and travel claims in a single approval workflow bridging Concur and SF Learning.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRNG_CLAIMS_DISPLAYHR Flight Ticket Claims Display and Reconciliation Report — A read-only HR report that retrieves and displays processed flight ticket expense claims enriched with employee master data, supporting batch invoice verification and financial reconciliation across multiple trip categories. SAP Concur (Expense — flight ticket claims) + SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition (Invoice Verification / Accounts Payable); SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP Datasphere for the cross-system reconciliation view.Fully Available as part of the Standard Flight-ticket claims are processed in Concur and posted to S/4HANA Cloud. Build the reconciliation as a SAP Analytics Cloud story (optionally using Datasphere to combine Concur and S/4HANA data) — no need to re-implement the ALV in ABAP. Report formatting as per SIDF can be configured by end users.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRNG_POSTING_CLAIMSHR Travel and Training Claim Financial Posting — A program to review approved employee travel and training claims in an editable interactive ALV grid and post them as Financial Accounting documents in SAP, integrating HR, travel, and financial data with custom GL account business logic. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This posts approved travel and training claims to financial accounting. SAP Concur processes expense claims, and EC Payroll handles employee reimbursements. BTP extension is needed for the specific financial posting logic that bridges approved claims from Concur to the accounting system, particularly for training cost allocation and cost center splitting rules.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAINING_FEEDBACKTraining Feedback Report for SAP Learning Solution (LSO) — A report that collects, aggregates, and displays employee post-training feedback responses enriched with HR attributes and weighted satisfaction scores per participant and training provider, supporting three reporting perspectives: provider, course, and overview. SAP SuccessFactors Learning + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This collects and aggregates post-training feedback from participants. SAP SuccessFactors Learning natively supports course evaluations, feedback collection, and satisfaction reporting. People Analytics can aggregate feedback scores across training programs. This is standard LMS evaluation functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_TRAINING_BUDGT_WF_COMMENTSTraining Budget Workflow Approval Comments Report — An HR report that displays training and travel trip requests together with their complete multi-level workflow approval trail, showing each approver name, decision comment, approval date, and time in an interactive ALV grid for audit and governance purposes. SAP Build Process Automation (My Inbox audit trail / Process Visibility) + SAP Analytics Cloud or SuccessFactors People Analytics for the consolidated approval-trail report.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Approval comments, approver names and timestamps are recorded automatically by SAP Build Process Automation (and by SuccessFactors Learning / Concur workflows). Use Process Visibility / SAC to expose the audit trail — no custom workflow-table extraction required.
HR (Custom) ZHR_RHTEILN0_LSOTraining Participant List with Attendance Documentation and Financial Settlement — A custom HR Learning Solution report that displays training participant lists as an ALV grid, generates printable or Word-based attendance sign-in sheets, and automates posting of training costs to employee cost centers in Financial Accounting. SAP SuccessFactors LearningFully Available as part of the Standard This displays training participant lists with attendance documentation and financial settlement status. SAP SuccessFactors Learning natively provides participant tracking, attendance recording, completion documentation, and reporting. This is standard LMS functionality available without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_RHTEILN0_LSO_SFTraining Participant List with SuccessFactors LMS Integration — A custom HR report that combines SuccessFactors LMS enrollment data with SAP HR attendance records and employee master data to provide training coordinators with a consolidated participant list including completion status, cost tracking, and attendance confirmation. SAP BTP + SAP SuccessFactors Learning APIsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This combines SuccessFactors LMS enrollment data with HR attendance records. SAP BTP is needed to synchronize data between SuccessFactors Learning and Time Tracking/Employee Central. The integration flow that maps LMS completions to HR records requires iFlow development using standard SF Learning and EC APIs.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_GOALS_CORRECTIONHR PMS Goals Data Correction and Synchronization Utility — A data correction program that synchronizes employee performance management goal records from the standard SAP HR infotype table into a custom shadow table to ensure data integrity for downstream HR processes. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & GoalsFully Available as part of the Standard This corrects and synchronizes employee performance goals data. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals provides native goal management including editing, cascading, and data correction capabilities through admin tools and APIs. This is standard functionality requiring no custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_EMP_GOALS_HRP1000Annual HR Performance Goal Rollover - Employee and Manager Goals Copy — A custom HR report that automatically copies manager and employee performance goal objects from the prior fiscal year into a new fiscal year within SAP Organizational Management, preventing manual re-entry and providing a full audit log of every created record. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals — Goal Plan Mass Copy / annual goal rollover (standard admin tool); SAP SuccessFactors Calibration for any related rating rollover.Fully Available as part of the Standard Annual goal rollover is a delivered admin function in SuccessFactors Goal Management (Goal Plan Mass Copy / rollover). HRP1000 objects do not exist in the public-cloud HR model; retire the Z-report and use the standard tool.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_SEND_NOTIFICATIONHR Performance Management System - Annual Appraisal Notification Sender — An HR report that retrieves employee annual appraisal final ratings from SAP Talent Management and sends personalized Arabic-language HTML email notifications to selected employees informing them of their yearly performance rating. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & GoalsFully Available as part of the Standard This sends notifications for annual appraisal cycles. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals has built-in email notification capabilities for appraisal cycle milestones — form launch, completion reminders, and overdue alerts. This is standard PMS notification functionality configured within the Performance module.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_SUBORDINATESHR PMS Subordinate Employee Goals and Performance Overview — An HR report that displays the performance management system goals and current appraisal status for all direct and indirect subordinates of a selected manager, enabling manager-level performance oversight across the reporting hierarchy. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays subordinate employee goals and performance overview for managers. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals provides native manager dashboards showing team goals, progress, and performance ratings. People Analytics enables custom team performance reports. This is standard manager self-service functionality.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PMS_TEMPLATE_KPI2HR Performance Management KPI Goals Report by Employee — A read-only HR report that extracts and displays individual KPI goals from employee performance appraisal forms grouped with full organizational attributes, for cross-employee review by HR managers during performance cycles. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This extracts KPI goals by employee from performance templates. SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals natively manages KPI-based goal plans with individual goal visibility. People Analytics can report on goal completion, KPI metrics, and employee-level goal details. This is standard Performance & Goals reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_QR_REQUEST_DISPLAYHR Quick Recognition Request Display and Processing — An HR report to monitor, enrich, and process employee Quick Recognition requests across their lifecycle stages, enabling HR users to view pending, completed, and approver-pending requests and mark fully approved requests as HR-completed. SAP SuccessFactors Rewards and Recognition (Quick Recognition / Spot Awards) + SuccessFactors EC workflows or SAP Build Process Automation for the approval lifecycle.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Quick Recognition / spot-award lifecycles are delivered by SuccessFactors Rewards and Recognition. Approval routing and status transitions are handled by standard EC workflows or by SAP Build Process Automation. The custom monitoring report can be replaced by a People Analytics view.
HR (Custom) ZHR_QR_REQ_QUOTA_STATUSEmployee Recognition (Shukran) Request and Quota Status Report — An HR report providing dual-view visibility into the Shukran employee recognition programme, showing individual recognition request approval statuses and department-wise recognition quota consumption for the current quarter. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This manages the Shukran (employee recognition) program including request quotas and status tracking. SAP SuccessFactors does not have a native employee recognition module with quota management. This requires a full custom application on SAP BTP using EC Workflows/Business Rules for approvals and a custom UI5 app for the recognition portal and quota tracking.
HR (Custom) ZHR_RHXSTR02Organisational Structure with Persons Report Launcher — A guided HR selection screen program that validates user input and launches the organisational structure chart report with persons for SAP Organisational Management, providing thorough input validation before delegation to the underlying chart report. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central — Org Chart / Position Org Chart and Company Structure Overview app (Fiori); SuccessFactors People Analytics for printable org-structure reports.Partially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) Org structure with persons is delivered by the standard EC Org Chart and Company Structure Overview Fiori app, with reportable variants in People Analytics. The custom selection-screen launcher around RHXSTR02 is no longer needed.
HR (Custom) ZHR_REPORTING_MGREmployee Reporting Manager Overview Report — An SAP HR report that displays employees alongside their reporting managers, positions, and organisational assignments in a bilingual interactive ALV grid, using a custom approval hierarchy class for manager resolution. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central + People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This displays employees with their reporting managers, positions, and organizational data. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central stores the full reporting relationship hierarchy, and People Analytics provides standard org-based reports showing employee-manager relationships. This is fully available as standard EC + People Analytics reporting.
HR (Custom) ZHR_SUPERVISORHR Supervisor and Employee Master Data Report — A consolidated HR report providing a unified view of employee personal details, organizational assignments, supervisor mapping, contact information, and employment classification with bilingual English/Arabic output. SAP SuccessFactors People AnalyticsFully Available as part of the Standard This provides a consolidated view of employee and supervisor details. SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics natively reports on employee-manager relationships, organizational data, and personal details from Employee Central. Standard People Analytics story reports can replicate this consolidated view without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHR_PROJECT_DELAYProject Implementation Delay - Purchase Order Inquiry Report — A procurement lookup report that consolidates purchase order header, line item, and vendor master data to support investigation of project implementation delays caused by supplier issues. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This is a procurement-related report showing purchase order details and project implementation delays. This does not belong to HR/SuccessFactors scope. Recommended migration path is SAP S/4HANA Procurement for PO management, or SAP Build Process Automation for workflow orchestration. Full BTP rebuild is required as this is outside the SuccessFactors domain entirely.
HR (Custom) ZHR_REPLICATION_ERROR_NOTIFYHR Replication Error Notification and Monitoring — A background HR batch report that detects data replication errors between SAP HR and connected external systems or staging areas, and sends automated email notifications to designated HR administrators for timely remediation. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This detects and notifies on data replication errors between SAP HR and SuccessFactors. SAP BTP provides monitoring dashboards and alerting for integration flows. SAP BTP can host custom error notification logic. Full rebuild is needed because the specific replication monitoring and error categorization logic is a custom operations tool without standard equivalent.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_OFF_BANKLETTER_SMEOff-Cycle HCM Bank Letter (SME) for Salary Disbursement — A payroll report that generates a formatted PDF off-cycle bank letter for SME salary disbursement, listing per-employee net-pay amounts grouped by bank with Arabic names and grand totals expressed in Arabic words, using the standard ZHCM_BANKLETTER_FORM1 Adobe form. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central PayrollPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This generates a formatted off-cycle bank letter for SME salary payments. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll handles off-cycle payroll runs and payment generation natively. Custom bank letter formatting (Arabic names, localized totals) may require a BTP extension or custom print form configuration within EC Payroll.
HR (Custom) ZHR_CC_COURT_RULING_NOTIFGeneral Court Ruling Notification for HR Legal Department — An automated background HR report that detects court rulings in open legal cases initiated by or involving SIDF and sends bilingual Arabic and English email notifications to responsible case officers, complementing the ASIDF-specific notification program. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (Intelligent Services / Alert Notifications)Fully Available as part of the Standard This sends automated notifications for court rulings in the HR Legal Department. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Intelligent Services provides event-based and scheduled alert notifications. Court ruling date monitoring can be configured using custom MDF objects and alert rules within EC, delivering HTML email notifications to relevant stakeholders without custom development.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_TE_AUTOTravel Expense Automation – HR Payroll Posting of Approved Trip Expenses — A report that automates the creation of HR payroll infotype records for approved employee travel expenses and triggers the travel accounting settlement process, eliminating manual re-entry between SAP Travel Management and HR Payroll. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This automates posting of approved travel expenses to HR payroll. SAP Concur handles expense processing, and its native integration with SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll can post reimbursable amounts. The BTP extension handles any custom payroll infotype mapping logic not covered by standard Concur-to-EC-Payroll integration.
HR (Custom) ZHCM_PENDING_TRAVEL_REQ_SFTPSAP to SuccessFactors Secure File Transfer Integration — A program that transfers employee-related data files between the SAP application server and an external SAP SuccessFactors SFTP/HTTPS endpoint, supporting both outbound and inbound directions with optional file-level encryption and decryption via SAP SSF cryptographic framework. SAP Concur Travel & Expense + SAP SuccessFactors Employee CentralPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This transfers employee data files between SAP and SuccessFactors via SFTP/HTTPS with encryption. SAP Concur handles travel data management while BTP replaces the custom SFTP logic. The BTP extension may be needed for file-level encryption/decryption requirements specific to this customer's security policy.
HR (Custom) ZHR_DIV_DET_LEGACY_UPDHR Organisational Hierarchy Synchronisation to Legacy System — A batch program that extracts the current multi-level organisational structure from SAP HCM, enriches it with bilingual English and Arabic names, and replaces the legacy system's organisation table with a fresh snapshot via Native SQL. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes the organizational hierarchy to a legacy system. SAP BTP would be needed to extract org structure data from SuccessFactors Employee Central and push it to the legacy system. However, this integration was marked as 'No Need' — implying the legacy system will be decommissioned or the org hierarchy will be consumed directly from SuccessFactors.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMPLOYEE_EXPENSESNew Joiners Payroll Expense Report — An HR/FI report providing a consolidated, employee-by-employee breakdown of all actual payroll-posted compensation components for newly hired employees, used for budget monitoring and onboarding cost control. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll + People AnalyticsPartially Available as Standard - BTP Extension (If Needed) This reports actual payroll expenses for new joiners. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll holds all payroll cost data, and People Analytics can build expense reports filtered by hire date. BTP extension may be needed for advanced formatting, cost center breakdowns, or FI posting details beyond standard payroll reporting capabilities.
HR (Custom) ZHR_EMPL_DET_COR_SYS_UPD_1Employee Hire and Termination Synchronisation with Correspondence Management System — A daily HR report that detects employee hiring and termination events in SAP and synchronises the employee profile data into an external correspondence management system automatically, with built-in retry logic for failed transmissions. __Not Available as SaaS — (If Needed - Full Rebuild on BTP) This synchronizes hire/termination events to a correspondence management system (variant). SAP BTP detects employee lifecycle events from SuccessFactors Employee Central and forwards them to the external correspondence system. Custom integration flow development is required for the specific target system's API format.

No services match your filters
Try adjusting the module or availability filter, or clear the search.
